    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000)) / 960.

                %_repetition_interval_time[($result6 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + $layer0)] := int((60000. / ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000) * (4. / real(%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result6 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)])))
              end if
            end if

        end while

      end while

      $group_count000 := 0
      while($group_count000 = 0) 
        $i331 := %loaded_instrument_types[0]
        if($i331 # -1)
          @ret1 := !instrument_name[$i331]
          $group_count000 := 1
          continue
        else
          @ret1 := "Unknown Instrument"
          $group_count000 := 1
          continue
        end if
      end while
      @path20 := @ret1
      @preset_path := @articulations_path & @path20 & " Articulations/"
    end if
    message("Preset Path: " & @preset_path)

    end if

    $i := 0
    while($i <= 3) 
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Layer " & ($i + 1))
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "alpha")

      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 0)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTPOS_Y, 20)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 627)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 300)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 50)
      $fade_out_end0 := %btn_editor_overview[$i]
      $fade_in_range0 := 0
      while($fade_in_range0 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
        set_control_par($fade_out_end0, %font_types[$fade_in_range0], %fonts_regular_white[$fade_in_range0])
        inc($fade_in_range0)
      end while
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview))
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_solo")
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 627)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 18)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview))
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_mute")

      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)

    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))

        set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    $selected_subarticulation := 0
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($nki_type # 0)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_editor")
      end if
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_humanize), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_humanization[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      if(%_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] >= 0)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular")
        $btn_articulation_release := 0
      else

        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular_disabled")
        $btn_articulation_release := 1
      end if
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
        set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
          else
            if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
            else
              if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
                $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
              else
                $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
      $i330 := $selected_subarticulation
      $i320 := 0
      while($i320 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
        if($i320 # $i330)
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)

          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)

            set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          end if

          $allow_repetitions0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
          $subarticulation_event0 := int(round((real($rr1) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($rr1 - 32, 31) + 1))))

          set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $rr1)
          set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $allow_repetitions0)
        end if

      end while
      if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.

        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))

      ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.

      $layer0 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($layer0 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31) .or. sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))

        if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
          $selected_subarticulation := 0
          $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
          $i330 := 0
          $i320 := 0
          while($i320 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1))

            else

        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
          $is_active01000 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
          $selected_category := $is_active01000
          $_ret280000 := 0
          while($_ret280000 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1))

            else
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            end if
            inc($_ret280000)
          end while
          $is_free1000 := 0

            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
              set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
              if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
                set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
              else
                set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
              end if
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
            end if
            inc($i)
          end while
          message("set scroll slider: " & $is_free1000)
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
        else
          $is_active01000 := 0
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
          $selected_category := 0
          $_ret280000 := 0
          while($_ret280000 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
            if($_ret280000 = $is_active01000)
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
            else
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            end if
            inc($_ret280000)
          end while
          $is_free1000 := 0
          $_ret280000 := 0
          while($_ret280000 <= 31) 
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] # -1)
              if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
                $is_free1000 := $_ret280000
              end if
            else
              $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $_ret280000
              $_ret280000 := 32
            end if
            inc($_ret280000)
          end while
          message("selected_idx: " & $is_free1000 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
          if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
            $is_free1000 := 0
          else
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
            $is_free1000 := $is_free1000 - (($is_free1000 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $is_free1000, 31))
          end if
          $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $is_active01000
          $i270200 := $is_free1000
          $i2700000 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
          $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i2700000))
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i2700000
          $i := 0
          while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
              set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
              if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
                set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
              else
                set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
              end if
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
            end if
            inc($i)
          end while
          message("set scroll slider: " & $is_free1000)
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if

function Preset______decr__
  $ret19 := $subarticulation0
  while($ret19 # -1) 
    $i270100 := 0
    %Preset____allocation[$ret19] := %Preset____allocation[$ret19] - $articulation_event_id1
    if(%Preset____allocation[$ret19] > 0)
      $ret19 := -1
      continue
    else
      %Preset____allocation[$ret19] := 0
    end if
    $subarticulation0 := $ret19
    $ret19 := -1
    $transition_note00 := %Preset____tags[$subarticulation0]
    $result710 := 1
    $_ret6500 := $transition_note00
    while($_ret6500 # -1) 
      $_sc_temp000 := 0
      %Floatmask____allocation[$_ret6500] := %Floatmask____allocation[$_ret6500] - $result710
      if(%Floatmask____allocation[$_ret6500] > 0)
        $_ret6500 := -1
        continue
      else
        %Floatmask____allocation[$_ret6500] := 0
      end if
      $transition_note00 := $_ret6500
      $_ret6500 := -1
      $_sc_temp000 := 0
      while($_sc_temp000 <= 1) 
        $fade_in_range001 := %_Floatmask____fm[($transition_note00 * 2) + $_sc_temp000]
        $fade_out_end001 := 1
        $result10 := $fade_in_range001
        while($result10 # -1) 
          $ret31 := 0
          %Bitlist____allocation[$result10] := %Bitlist____allocation[$result10] - $fade_out_end001
          if(%Bitlist____allocation[$result10] > 0)
            $result10 := -1
            continue
          else
            %Bitlist____allocation[$result10] := 0
          end if
          $fade_in_range001 := $result10
          $result10 := -1
          $allow_repetitions00 := $fade_in_range001
          $fade_in_start000 := 0
          if($allow_repetitions00 # -1)
            %Bitlist____val[$allow_repetitions00] := 0
          end if
        end while
        inc($_sc_temp000)
      end while
      $transition_type20 := $transition_note00
      if($transition_type20 # -1)
        $_iter17 := 0
        while($_iter17 <= 1) 
          %_Floatmask____fm[($transition_type20 * 2) + $_iter17] := -1
          inc($_iter17)
        end while
      end if
    end while
    $allow_repetitions0 := $subarticulation0
    $rr1 := 0
    if($allow_repetitions0 # -1)
      %Preset____deleted[$allow_repetitions0] := 0
      !Preset____file[$allow_repetitions0] := ""
      %Preset____tags[$allow_repetitions0] := -1
      !Preset____name[$allow_repetitions0] := ""
      %Preset____id[$allow_repetitions0] := 0
      %Preset____icon[$allow_repetitions0] := 0
    end if
  end while
end function
function Preset______incr__
  if($lowest00 # -1)
    %Preset____allocation[$lowest00] := %Preset____allocation[$lowest00] + $highest1
  end if
end function
function PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
  $i27020 := 0
  $is_free100 := 0
  while($is_free100 <= (num_elements(%btn_ks_selector) - 1))

function Scrollarea__update_scroll_handle
  $ii51 := 2
  $_short_circuit401 := ((%Browser____num_shown_presets[$i28000] + 9) - 1) / 9
  $_sc_temp001 := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
  if($_short_circuit401 > 2)
    $_sc_temp001 := (get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) * $ii51) / $_short_circuit401
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $_sc_temp001)
  if($_sc_temp001 < get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + ((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - $_sc_temp001) - ((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * (get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - $_sc_temp001)) / 1000000)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end function

function Scrollarea__update_position
  $transition_note01 := (1 + sh_right(abs(%Browser____num_shown_presets[$_ret6501] mod 9) - 1, 31)) * 9

  call Scrollarea__repaint
end function
function Scrollarea__focus
  $i36001 := $i36001 - (($i36001 - (%Browser____num_shown_presets[$i3701] - 1)) .and. sh_right((%Browser____num_shown_presets[$i3701] - 1) - $i36001, 31))
  $i3801 := $i36001 / 9
  $string021 := $scroll__up / 9
  $i3901 := ($string021 + 2) - 1
  $result6 := $string021
  if($i3801 < $string021)
    $result6 := $i3801
  else
    if($i3801 > $i3901)
      $result6 := ($i3801 - 2) + 1
    end if
  end if
  $transition0 := ((%Browser____num_shown_presets[$i3701] + 9) - 1) / 9
  $layer0 := 0
  if($transition0 > 2)
    $layer0 := $transition0 - 2
  end if
  $result6 := ($result6 * (1 + (sh_right($layer0 - $result6, 31) .or. sh_right($result6, 31)))) - ($layer0 * sh_right($layer0 - $result6, 31))
  $scroll__up := $result6 * 9
  $_ret6501 := $i3701
  $result711 := $i36001
  call Scrollarea__update_position
end function

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_bg_lower), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $fade_in_start0)

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_browser_bg_lower), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $fade_in_start0)

end function
function update_all_ranges
  $lowest1 := 128
  $highest1 := 0
  $i6 := 0
  while($i6 <= 0) 
    $iii2 := $i6
    $ii8 := 128
    $i42 := 0
    $i331 := 0
    $group_count000 := 0
    while($group_count000 <= 7) 
      if(%_keyswitch_states[($iii2 * 8) + $group_count000] = 1)
        $i331 := 0
        while($i331 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] * 12)) < $ii8)
              $ii8 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] * 12)
            end if
            if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] * 12)) > $i42)
              $i42 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] * 12)
            end if
          end if
          inc($i331)
        end while
      end if
      inc($group_count000)
    end while
    %_instrument_range[$iii2 * 2] := ($ii8 - $range_offset_lower) - (%octave_shift[$iii2] * 12)
    %_instrument_range[($iii2 * 2) + 1] := ($i42 + $range_offset_upper) - (%octave_shift[$iii2] * 12)
    $lowest1 := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - %_instrument_range[$i6 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$i6 * 2] - $lowest1, 31))
    $highest1 := $highest1 - (($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i6 * 2) + 1]) .and. sh_right($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i6 * 2) + 1], 31))
    inc($i6)
  end while
  %nki_range[0] := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1)) .and. sh_right($lowest1 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1), 31))
  %nki_range[1] := $highest1
  $modulation_position0 := 0
  while($modulation_position0 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($modulation_position0, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($modulation_position0 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($modulation_position0 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($modulation_position0, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($modulation_position0)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function articulation_update_minimal_delay
  %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] := 0
  $transition_type1 := 0
  while($transition_type1 <= 3) 
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)] # -1)
      if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)]]] = 2)
        %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] := %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - ((%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - $lookahead) .and. sh_right(%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - $lookahead, 31))
      else
        %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] := %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - ((%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)]]]) .and. sh_right(%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)]]], 31))
      end if
    end if
    inc($transition_type1)
  end while
end function
function update_minimal_delays
  $subarticulation_idx3 := 0
  $note8 := 0
  while($note8 <= 0) 
    $subarticulation_idx3 := 0
    while($subarticulation_idx3 <= 7) 
      $min5 := $note8
      $idx38 := $subarticulation_idx3
      call articulation_update_minimal_delay
      inc($subarticulation_idx3)
    end while
    inc($note8)
  end while
end function
function get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name
  $group_count000 := 0
  while($group_count000 = 0) 
    $i331 := %loaded_instrument_types[0]
    if($i331 # -1)
      @ret1 := !instrument_name[$i331]
      $group_count000 := 1
      continue
    else
      @ret1 := "Unknown Instrument"
      $group_count000 := 1
      continue
    end if
  end while
end function
function choose_mode
  $use_constant_delay := $modulation_position0
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_choose_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $modulation_position0)
  if($use_constant_delay = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_live), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_lookahead), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[1])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_live), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_lookahead), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
  end if
end function

function update_keyswitch_selection

    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$_ret920], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $_ret920])
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch[$_ret920], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[(6 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $_ret920]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $_ret920] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $_ret920])])

    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$ii401], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $ii401])
    set_control_par(%swi_keyswitch_purge[$_ret920], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $_ret920])
    set_key_pressed(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $_ret920, %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $_ret920] * abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($nki_type - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)))
    inc($_ret920)
  end while
  $lowest1 := 128
  $highest1 := 0
  $i6 := 0
  while($i6 <= 0) 
    $iii2 := $i6
    $ii8 := 128
    $i42 := 0
    $i331 := 0
    $group_count000 := 0

        $i331 := 0

            if((%subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] * 12)) < $ii8)
              $ii8 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] * 12)
            end if
            if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] * 12)) > $i42)
              $i42 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($group_count000 * 4) + $i331)]]] * 12)
            end if
          end if
          inc($i331)
        end while
      end if
      inc($group_count000)
    end while
    %_instrument_range[$iii2 * 2] := ($ii8 - $range_offset_lower) - (%octave_shift[$iii2] * 12)
    %_instrument_range[($iii2 * 2) + 1] := ($i42 + $range_offset_upper) - (%octave_shift[$iii2] * 12)
    $lowest1 := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - %_instrument_range[$i6 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$i6 * 2] - $lowest1, 31))
    $highest1 := $highest1 - (($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i6 * 2) + 1]) .and. sh_right($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i6 * 2) + 1], 31))
    inc($i6)
  end while
  %nki_range[0] := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1)) .and. sh_right($lowest1 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1), 31))
  %nki_range[1] := $highest1
  $modulation_position0 := 0
  while($modulation_position0 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($modulation_position0, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($modulation_position0 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($modulation_position0 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($modulation_position0, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($modulation_position0)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $selected_subarticulation := 0
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    if($nki_type # 0)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_editor")
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_humanize), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_humanization[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    if(%_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] >= 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular")
      $btn_articulation_release := 0
    else
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Release")
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular_disabled")
      $btn_articulation_release := 1
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1))

      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
      inc($i)

    if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
      $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
    else
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
          else
            if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
            else
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
