            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
              $is_free1000 := $_ret280000
            end if
          else
            $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $_ret280000
            $_ret280000 := 32
          end if
          inc($_ret280000)
        end while
        message("selected_idx: " & $is_free1000 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
        if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          $is_free1000 := 0
        else
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
          $is_free1000 := $is_free1000 - (($is_free1000 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $is_free1000, 31))
        end if
        $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $is_active01000
        $i270200 := $is_free1000
        $i2700000 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
        $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i2700000))
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i2700000
        $i := 0
        while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
            set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
            else
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            end if
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          end if
          inc($i)
        end while
        message("set scroll slider: " & $is_free1000)
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function editor_page_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  if($nki_type # 0)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_editor")
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_humanize), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_humanization[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  if(%_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular")
    $btn_articulation_release := 0
  else
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Release")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular_disabled")
    $btn_articulation_release := 1
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
  if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
    $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
  else
    if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
      $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
    else
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
          else
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $i330 := $selected_subarticulation
  $i320 := 0
  while($i320 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
    if($i320 # $i330)
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    inc($i320)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
    else
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 4)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_editor_overview) - 1)) 
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]]])
        set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
      else
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         Empty")
        set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[6])
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode := %_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if(((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5)) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
      $mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $btn_subarticulation_trans_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed = 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $rr1 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $allow_repetitions0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $subarticulation_event0 := int(round((real($rr1) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($rr1 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $idx37 := int((real($allow_repetitions0) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$subarticulation_event0] + $idx37)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $rr1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $allow_repetitions0)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  end if
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $layer0 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($layer0 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31) .or. sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
      $selected_subarticulation := 0
      $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
      $i330 := 0
      $i320 := 0
      while($i320 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
        if($i320 # $i330)
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($i320)
      end while
    end if
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      $is_active01000 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := $is_active01000
      $_ret280000 := 0
      while($_ret280000 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
        if($_ret280000 = $is_active01000)
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        inc($_ret280000)
      end while
      $is_free1000 := 0
      $_ret280000 := 0
      while($_ret280000 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] # -1)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            $is_free1000 := $_ret280000
          end if
        else
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $_ret280000
          $_ret280000 := 32
        end if
        inc($_ret280000)
      end while
      message("selected_idx: " & $is_free1000 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $is_free1000 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $is_free1000 := $is_free1000 - (($is_free1000 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $is_free1000, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $is_active01000
      $i270200 := $is_free1000
      $i2700000 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i2700000))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i2700000
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      message("set scroll slider: " & $is_free1000)
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    else
      $is_active01000 := 0
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := 0
      $_ret280000 := 0
      while($_ret280000 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
        if($_ret280000 = $is_active01000)
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        inc($_ret280000)
      end while
      $is_free1000 := 0
      $_ret280000 := 0
      while($_ret280000 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] # -1)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            $is_free1000 := $_ret280000
          end if
        else
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $_ret280000
          $_ret280000 := 32
        end if
        inc($_ret280000)
      end while
      message("selected_idx: " & $is_free1000 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $is_free1000 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $is_free1000 := $is_free1000 - (($is_free1000 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $is_free1000, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $is_active01000
      $i270200 := $is_free1000
      $i2700000 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i2700000))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i2700000
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      message("set scroll slider: " & $is_free1000)
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_name), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_editor_keyswitch_icon), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $rr1 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $allow_repetitions0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $subarticulation_event0 := int(round((real($rr1) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($rr1 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $idx37 := int((real($allow_repetitions0) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$subarticulation_event0] + $idx37)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $rr1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $allow_repetitions0)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  end if
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $layer0 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($layer0 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31) .or. sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
end function
function main_page_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_noeditor")
end function
function select_instrument_slot
  $selected_instrument := $subarticulation0
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_instrument_name_ensemble), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "(" & !instrument_name[%loaded_instrument_types[$subarticulation0]] & ")")
  $mnu_instrument_selector := $subarticulation0
  call update_keyswitch_selection
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    call editor_page_open
  else
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      call main_page_open
    end if
  end if
end function
function wait_or_zero
  if(%set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)
    wait(%set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end if
end function
function keyswitches_on_note_base
  %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $lookahead * $use_constant_delay
  call wait_or_zero
  %check_before0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %changed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  if(in_range(%uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $keyswitch_octave * 12, (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1))
    %inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 0) 
      %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 7) 
        %check_before0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %_keyswitch_states[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        %_keyswitch_states[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %KEY_DOWN[($keyswitch_octave * 12) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        if(%check_before0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # %_keyswitch_states[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
          %changed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
          %_keyswitch_enabled_time[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
        end if
        $selected_keyswitch := %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ($keyswitch_octave * 12)
        inc(%ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      inc(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    if(%changed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
      call update_keyswitch_selection
    end if
  end if
end function
function keyswitches_on_note
  %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  call keyswitches_on_note_base
end function
function is_in_note_selection
  $highest1 := 0
  select($lowest00)
    case 0
      $highest1 := 1
    case 1
      $highest1 := - sh_right(abs($s00) - 1, 31)
    case 2
      $highest1 := - sh_right(abs($s00) - 1, 31) + - sh_right(abs($s00 - 1) - 1, 31)
    case 3
      $highest1 := (- sh_right(abs($s00) - 1, 31) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31)))) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - (($highest00 / 2) - 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 4
      $highest1 := (- sh_right(abs($s00) - 1, 31) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31)))) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ((($highest00 - 1) / 2) + 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 5
      $highest1 := - sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31)
    case 6
      $highest1 := (((- sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - (($highest00 / 2) - 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - $highest00) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - ($highest00 + 1), 31)))) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - (((($highest00 + 1) - 1) / 2) + 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - ($highest00 + 1), 31))
    case 7
      $highest1 := (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - (($highest00 / 2) - 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 8
      $highest1 := (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ((($highest00 - 1) / 2) + 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 9
      $highest1 := - sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 - 1)) - 1, 31)
    case 10
      $highest1 := - sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 - 1)) - 1, 31) + - sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 - 2)) - 1, 31)
    case 11
      $highest1 := (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 - 1)) - 1, 31) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31)))) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - (($highest00 / 2) - 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 12
      $highest1 := (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 - 1)) - 1, 31) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31)))) + (- sh_right(abs($s00 - ((($highest00 - 1) / 2) + 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 13
      $highest1 := - sh_right(abs($s00) - 1, 31) + - sh_right(abs($s00 - ($highest00 - 1)) - 1, 31)
    case -2147483648 to 134217727
      $highest1 := 0
  end select
  $is_in_note_selection_boolean := 1 + sh_right(abs($highest1) - 1, 31)
end function
function articulation_event_clear
  $output_type0 := 0
  if($instrument2 # -1)
    $output_type0 := 0
    while($output_type0 <= 3) 
      %_articulation_event_list[($instrument2 * 4) + $output_type0] := -1
      inc($output_type0)
    end while
    %articulation_event_instrument[$instrument2] := -1
    %articulation_event_keyswitch[$instrument2] := -1
    %articulation_event_note[$instrument2] := -1
    %articulation_event_timestamp[$instrument2] := -1
  end if
end function
function articulation_event_is_event_active
  $is_active0 := 0
  $i28 := 0
  $trigger_clear0 := -1
  if($articulation_event_id2 >= 0)
    $i28 := 0
    while($i28 <= 3) 
      if(%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id2 * 4) + $i28] # -1)
        if(%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id2 * 4) + $i28] = -999)
          $is_active0 := 1
          $trigger_clear0 := 0
        else
          if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id2 * 4) + $i28]] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
            $is_active0 := 1
            $trigger_clear0 := 0
          else
            if(%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id2 * 4) + $i28] >= 0)
              if($trigger_clear0 = -1)
                $trigger_clear0 := 1
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i28)
    end while
  end if
  if($trigger_clear0 = 1)
    $instrument2 := $articulation_event_id2
    call articulation_event_clear
  end if
  $ret15 := $is_active0
end function

end function

function update_selected_notes
  $ks4 := 0
  $pressed_key_idx := 0
  $i := %nki_range[1]
  while($i >= %nki_range[0]) 
    if((%pressed_keys[$i] > ($ENGINE_UPTIME - $input_acceptance_time)) or ((($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_RELEASE) or ($last_note_input_time > ($ENGINE_UPTIME - $input_acceptance_time))) and (%pressed_keys[$i] > 0)))
      message("trig " & $i)
      $inst := 0
      while($inst <= 0) 
        $s00 := ($num_pressed_keys - 1) - $pressed_key_idx
        $highest00 := $num_pressed_keys
        $lowest00 := %note_selections[$inst]
        call is_in_note_selection
        if(($is_in_note_selection_boolean = 1) and (%_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst * 128) + $i] = 0))
          %_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst * 128) + $i] := 1
          message("b")
          $subarticulation_id0 := $inst
          $ret23 := $i
          $level0 := 1 - ((1 - %key_velocity[$i]) .and. sh_right(1 - %key_velocity[$i], 31))
          $subarticulation_event_id9 := %pressed_keys[$i] - $ENGINE_UPTIME
          call articulations_on_note
          $_ret15000 := $_iter801700
          $_ret28000 := $_ret2800
        else
          if(($is_in_note_selection_boolean = 0) and (%_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst * 128) + $i] = 1))
            %_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst * 128) + $i] := 0
            $modulation0 := $inst
            $subarticulation_event_id10 := $i
            call articulations_note_off
            $i270000 := $ii4
          end if
        end if
        inc($inst)
      end while
    end if
    if(%pressed_keys[$i] > 0)
      inc($pressed_key_idx)
    end if
    dec($i)
  end while
  $inst := 0
  while($inst <= 0) 
    %active_notes[$inst] := 0
    $i := %nki_range[0]
    while($i <= %nki_range[1]) 
      if(%_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst * 128) + $i] = 1)
        inc(%active_notes[$inst])
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    inc($inst)
  end while
end function
function subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
  $result7 := 0
  if($subarticulation_id0 >= 0)
    if(%subarticulation_type_behavior_list[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id0]]] = 1)
      $result7 := 1
    end if
  end if
  $ret23 := $result7
end function
function subarticulation_event_set_event_id
  %subarticulation_event_list[$_iter801700] := $_iter8002300
end function
function subarticulation_event_fade_out
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$lowest00] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    fade_out(%subarticulation_event_list[$lowest00], $highest1 * 1000, $lowest1)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$lowest00] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$lowest00], $highest1 * 1000, $lowest1)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$lowest00] # -1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$lowest00], $highest1 * 1000, $lowest1)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$lowest00] # -1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$lowest00], $highest1 * 1000, $lowest1)
    end if
    if($lowest1 = 1)
      $_iter801700 := $lowest00
      $_iter8002300 := -1
      call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
    end if
  end if
end function
function trigger_ks_fade
  $ks_fade_time := %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  %event2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $allow_repetitions0 := 0
  $rr1 := 0
  while($rr1 < num_elements(%found_shared_legatos)) 
    %found_shared_legatos[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
    inc($rr1)
  end while
  $i := %nki_range[0]
  while($i <= %nki_range[1]) 
    %inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 1) 
      %longs_in_new_keyswitches0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %longs_in_new_keyswitches0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 8) 
        if(%_keyswitch_states[(%inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 1)
          %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4) 
            $subarticulation_id0 := %_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]
            call subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
            %_ret440[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $ret23
            if(%_ret440[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
              %longs_in_new_keyswitches0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
            end if
            if(%subarticulations_interval_selection[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]] > 0)
              if(search(%found_shared_legatos, %subarticulations_interval_selection[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]]) = -1)
                %found_shared_legatos[search(%found_shared_legatos, 0)] := %subarticulations_interval_selection[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]]
              end if
            end if
            inc(%subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
        end if
        inc(%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 8) 
        %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        $subarticulation3 := %inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        $note15 := %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        $keyswitch15 := $i
        call event_list_get_articulation_event
        %event2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $result8
        if(%event2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0)

function articulations_compute_modulation

  message("result: " & $result8)

end function
function articulations_compute_fade_level
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := 0.
  $fade_in_start0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i2800 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  $fade_in_range0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i2800 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  $fade_out_end0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i2800 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  $fade_out_range0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i2800 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  if(in_range($modulation_position0, $fade_in_start0, $fade_out_end0))
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := 1.
    if(in_range($modulation_position0, $fade_in_start0, $fade_in_start0 + $fade_in_range0) and ($fade_in_range0 > 0))
      ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := real($modulation_position0 - $fade_in_start0) / real($fade_in_range0)
    else
      if(in_range($modulation_position0, $fade_out_end0 - $fade_out_range0, $fade_out_end0) and ($fade_out_range0 > 0))
        ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := real($fade_out_end0 - $modulation_position0) / real($fade_out_range0)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  ~ret27 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0
end function

function get_next_rr
  $rr1 := 0
  $allow_repetitions0 := 0
  if(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] = 0)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 0)
      $rr1 := (%_rr_data_idx[($instrument12 * 4096) + (($keyswitch12 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note14))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]
    else
      $rr1 := random(0, %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - 1)
    end if
  else
    if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - %_rr_data_time[($instrument12 * 4096) + (($keyswitch12 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note14))]) > %subarticulations_rrr_reset_time[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]])
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 0)
        $rr1 := (%_rr_data_idx[($instrument12 * 4096) + (($keyswitch12 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note14))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]
      else
        $rr1 := random(0, %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - 1)
        $allow_repetitions0 := 1
      end if
    else
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 0)
        $rr1 := %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - ((%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - ((%_rr_data_idx[($instrument12 * 4096) + (($keyswitch12 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note14))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]])) .and. sh_right(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - ((%_rr_data_idx[($instrument12 * 4096) + (($keyswitch12 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note14))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]), 31))
      else
        $rr1 := random(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]], %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - 1)
      end if
    end if
    %_rr_data_time[($instrument12 * 4096) + (($keyswitch12 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note14))] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  end if
  if(($rr1 = %_rr_data_idx[($instrument12 * 4096) + (($keyswitch12 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note14))]) and ($allow_repetitions0 = 0))
    $rr1 := ($rr1 + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument12 * 32) + (($keyswitch12 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]
  end if
  %_rr_data_idx[($instrument12 * 4096) + (($keyswitch12 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note14))] := $rr1
  $ret28 := $rr1
end function
function subarticulation_event_get_free_index
  $current01400 := -1
  $_iter91400 := 0
  while(($_iter91400 < 256) and ($_iter91400 >= 0)) 
    $_iter91400 := search(%subarticulation_event_list, -1, $_iter91400, 256)
    if($_iter91400 >= 0)
      if(%subarticulation_event_last_used[$_iter91400] < ($ENGINE_UPTIME - $lookahead))
        $current01400 := $_iter91400
        $_iter91400 := 256
      end if
      inc($_iter91400)
    end if
  end while
  $_iter801400 := $current01400
end function

function subarticulation_event_fade_in
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$i6] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    fade_in(%subarticulation_event_list[$i6], $fade_time1 * 1000)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$i6] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$i6], $fade_time1 * 1000)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$i6] # -1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$i6], $fade_time1 * 1000)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$i6] # -1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$i6], $fade_time1 * 1000)
    end if
  end if
end function

function subarticulation_event_change_vol
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$ks00] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    change_vol(%subarticulation_event_list[$ks00], $s00, $highest00)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$ks00] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      change_vol(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$ks00], $s00, $highest00)
    end if
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_add
  $idx37 := search(%repetition_engine_subarticulation_events, -1)
  if($idx37 # -1)
    %repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[$idx37] := $subarticulation_event0
    $repetition_engine_active := 1
    if($repetition_engine_start_time = -1)
      $repetition_engine_start_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    end if
    $repetition_engine_highest_idx := $repetition_engine_highest_idx - (($repetition_engine_highest_idx - $idx37) .and. sh_right($repetition_engine_highest_idx - $idx37, 31))
  else
    message("REACHED MAX_SUBARTICULATIONS_IN_REPETITION_ENGINE")
  end if
end function
function update_authoring_labels
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_sustain_release & " + " & $sli_sustain_release_offset & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_start), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_trans_start & " + " & $sli_trans_start_offset & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_trans_fadeIn) / 1000000.) * 750.) & " + " & int((real($sli_trans_fadeIn_offset) / 1000000.) * 750.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, (round((real($sli_trans_volume) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " + " & (round((real($sli_trans_volume_offset) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " dB")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_trans_fadeOut) / 1000000.) * 1000.) & " + " & int((real($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset) / 1000000.) * 1000.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_wait), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_sustain_wait) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_sustain_wait_offset) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_sustain_fadeIn) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " ms")
end function
function update_authoring_transition
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_authoring_follow), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($vlue_authoring_start_note), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $i28100)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($vlue_authoring_end_note), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $is_active0100)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $_ret28000)
    if(abs($i28100 - $is_active0100) <= 12)
      $authoring_interval_valid := 1
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_start), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_wait), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_start_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeIn_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_wait_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i28100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i28100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i28100), 31) * 12)))])
      call update_authoring_labels
    else
      $authoring_interval_valid := 0
    end if
    if($authoring_interval_valid = 1)

    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_authoring_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
