end function
function last_transitions_update
  $i36 := 0
  while($i36 <= (num_elements(%_last_transitions) - 1)) 
    if(%_last_transitions[$i36] # -1)
      if(%_last_transitions_timecode[$i36] < ($ENGINE_UPTIME - 2000))
        %_last_transitions[$i36] := -1
      end if
    end if
    inc($i36)
  end while
end function
function last_transitions_contains
  $result11 := 0
  call last_transitions_update
  $i37 := 0
  while($i37 <= 7) 
    if(%_last_transitions[($instrument3 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $i37))] = ((128 * $transition_type0) + $note4))
      $result11 := 1
      %_last_transitions[($instrument3 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $i37))] := -1
    end if
    inc($i37)
  end while
  $ret31 := $result11
end function
function last_transitions_add_event
  $idx38 := -1
  $min5 := %_last_transitions_timecode[($instrument5 * 256) + (($keyswitch4 * 32) + ($subarticulation_idx3 * 8))]
  $min_idx0 := 0
  $i38 := 0
  if($transition_type1 >= 0)
    $i38 := 0
    while($i38 <= 7) 
      if(%_last_transitions[($instrument5 * 256) + (($keyswitch4 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 8) + $i38))] = -1)
        $idx38 := $i38
        if($min5 > %_last_transitions_timecode[($instrument5 * 256) + (($keyswitch4 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 8) + $i38))])
          $min5 := %_last_transitions_timecode[($instrument5 * 256) + (($keyswitch4 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 8) + $i38))]
          $min_idx0 := $i38
        end if
      end if
      inc($i38)
    end while
    if($idx38 # -1)
      %_last_transitions[($instrument5 * 256) + (($keyswitch4 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 8) + $idx38))] := (128 * $transition_type1) + $note8
      %_last_transitions_timecode[($instrument5 * 256) + (($keyswitch4 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 8) + $idx38))] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      %_last_transitions[($instrument5 * 256) + (($keyswitch4 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 8) + $min_idx0))] := (128 * $transition_type1) + $note8
      %_last_transitions_timecode[($instrument5 * 256) + (($keyswitch4 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 8) + $min_idx0))] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    end if
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_remove
  $trigger_clear0100 := search(%repetition_engine_subarticulation_events, $i270100)
  if($trigger_clear0100 # -1)
    %repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[$trigger_clear0100] := -1
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_note_off
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id11] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    message("release subart " & $subarticulation_event_id11)
    $subarticulation_id4 := %subarticulation_event_subarticulation[$subarticulation_event_id11]
    $i270100 := $subarticulation_event_id11
    call repetition_engine_remove
    if(((%subarticulations_release_time[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - %last_pressed[%subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id11]]) < %subarticulations_release_time[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]])) or (%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]] * 32) + ((%articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]] * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$subarticulation_event_id11])] > 0))
      $idx390 := %_articulation_release[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]] * 8) + %articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]]]
      if($idx390 >= 0)
        $lowest00 := $subarticulation_event_id11
        $highest1 := $idx390
        $lowest1 := 1
        call subarticulation_event_fade_out
      else
        if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 9))
          $idx390 := 300
          $lowest00 := $subarticulation_event_id11
          $highest1 := 300
          $lowest1 := 1
          call subarticulation_event_fade_out
        else
          note_off(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id11])
          if(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id11] # -1)
            note_off(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id11])
          end if
        end if
      end if
      if((%subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 1) and (($authoring_page_active = 0) or ($btn_play_sustain = 1)))
        $event3 := play_note(%subarticulation_event_actual_note[$subarticulation_event_id11], %key_velocity[%subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id11]], 0, 0)
        $event0 := $event3
        $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
        $instrument2 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]]
        call redirect_output_ensemble
        $octave_event0 := -1
        if(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer[$subarticulation_event_id11] # 0)
          $octave_event0 := play_note(%subarticulation_event_actual_note[$subarticulation_event_id11] + 12, %key_velocity[%subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id11]], 0, 0)
          $event0 := $octave_event0
          $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
          $instrument2 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]]
          call redirect_output_ensemble
        end if
        $_iter801700 := $subarticulation_event_id11
        $_iter8002300 := $event3
        call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
        $_iter8002100 := $subarticulation_event_id11
        $_iter801500 := $octave_event0
        call subarticulation_octave_layer_set_event_id
        $current010400 := $subarticulation_event_id11
        call subarticulation_event_disallow_groups
        $ii4 := 0
        $i39 := 0
        while($i39 <= (%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] - 1)) 
          $ii4 := 0
          while($ii4 <= 5) 
            if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] # 2) and (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] # 9))
              $cc_value110 := $subarticulation_event_id11
              $transition_idx000 := (((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] + 1) + (((6 * %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]]) * %subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]]) * (%subarticulation_event_interval[$subarticulation_event_id11] * 2))) + ((($i39 * (%subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] + 1)) + 1) * 6)) + $ii4
              call subarticulation_event_allow_groups
            else
              $cc_value110 := $subarticulation_event_id11
              $transition_idx000 := (((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] + 1) + (6 * ((%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] * 2) + %subarticulations_trans_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]]))) + ($i39 * 6)) + $ii4
              call subarticulation_event_allow_groups
            end if
            inc($ii4)
          end while
          inc($i39)
        end while
        $subarticulation_event_id10 := $subarticulation_event_id11
        $modulation0 := %subarticulation_event_modulation[$subarticulation_event_id11]
        call subarticulation_set_modulation
        $subarticulation_event_id9 := $subarticulation_event_id11
        $level0 := %subarticulation_event_level[$subarticulation_event_id11]
        call subarticulation_set_level
        $ks00 := $subarticulation_event_id11
        $s00 := %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]] * 32) + ((%articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]] * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$subarticulation_event_id11])] * 1000
        $highest00 := 1
        call subarticulation_event_change_vol
        if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 9))
          $group_count000 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]]
          $iii2 := %subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id11]
          call note_to_string
          $_ret830 := $i331
          %_release_per_string[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]] * 10) + ($_ret830 * 2)] := $event3
          $group_count000 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]]
          $iii2 := %subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id11]
          call note_to_string
          $reduced_note00 := $i331
          %_release_per_string[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11]] * 10) + (($reduced_note00 * 2) + 1)] := $octave_event0
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $_iter801700 := $subarticulation_event_id11
    $_iter8002300 := -1
    call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
    $_iter8002100 := $subarticulation_event_id11
    $_iter801500 := -1
    call subarticulation_octave_layer_set_event_id
  end if
  %subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id11] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_actual_note[$subarticulation_event_id11] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_subarticulation[$subarticulation_event_id11] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_modulation[$subarticulation_event_id11] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_level[$subarticulation_event_id11] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_interval[$subarticulation_event_id11] := 0
  %subarticulation_event_last_used[$subarticulation_event_id11] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  %subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id11] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$subarticulation_event_id11] := -1
end function
function subarticulation_play_note
  $subarticulation_event_id18 := 0
  call subarticulation_event_get_free_index
  $subarticulation_event_id18 := $_iter801400
  $idx360 := 0
  $result90 := -1
  if(%_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($instrument7 * 8) + $keyswitch7] = 1)
    $modulation1 := int((1000000. * (real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($instrument7 * 32) + (($keyswitch7 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx5)]) + ((real($velocity0) / 127.) * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($instrument7 * 32) + (($keyswitch7 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx5)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($instrument7 * 32) + (($keyswitch7 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx5)])))) / 127.)
    $trigger_clear000 := $instrument7
    $i2800 := $keyswitch7
    $is_active000 := $subarticulation_idx5
    $modulation_position0 := $velocity0
    call articulations_compute_fade_level
    ~_ret640 := ~ret27
    $level1 := int(((real($velocity0) / 127.) * 1000000.) * ~_ret640)
  end if
  $fade_out_range01 := -1
  $fade_in_start01 := -1
  $fade_in_range01 := int((real($modulation1) / 1000000.) * 127.)
  $fade_out_end01 := 0
  $ii5 := 0
  if(($subarticulation_event_id18 # -1) and ($subarticulation_idx5 # -1))
    $_short_circuit40 := 0
    $_sc_temp00 := 0
    if((($subarticulations_solo_states_any_active = 0) or (%_subarticulations_solo_states[($instrument7 * 32) + (($keyswitch7 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx5)] = 1)) and (%_subarticulations_mute_states[($instrument7 * 32) + (($keyswitch7 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx5)] = 0))
      $_sc_temp00 := 1
    end if
    if($_sc_temp00 = 1)
      if(%global_fade_in[$note9] = 0)
        $_short_circuit40 := 1
      else
        $subarticulation_id0 := $subarticulation_id1
        call subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
        $_ret650 := $ret23
        if($_ret650 = 1)
          $_short_circuit40 := 1
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($_short_circuit40 = 1)
      if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]] # 2) and (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]] # 9))
        $idx360 := play_note($note9 - (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]] * 12), $velocity0, 0, 0)
        $event0 := $idx360
        $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
        $instrument2 := $instrument7
        call redirect_output_ensemble
        if(($octave_layer0 # 0) and in_range((($note9 - (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]] * 12)) + $transpose0) + (12 * $octave_layer0), %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]], %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]]))
          $result90 := play_note((($note9 - (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]] * 12)) + $transpose0) + (12 * $octave_layer0), $velocity0, 0, 0)
          $event0 := $result90
          $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
          $instrument2 := $instrument7
          call redirect_output_ensemble
        end if
        if(((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]] = 3)) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]] = 5))
          if($previous_note1 >= 0)
            if((%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$previous_note1]] = $instrument7) and (%articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$previous_note1]] = $keyswitch7))
              $lowest00 := $previous_note1
              $highest1 := 1000 - int((700. * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($instrument7 * 32) + (($keyswitch7 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx5)])) / 100.)
              $lowest1 := 1
              call subarticulation_event_fade_out
            end if
          end if
        end if
        $_iter801700 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $_iter8002300 := $idx360
        call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
        $_iter8002100 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $_iter801500 := $result90
        call subarticulation_octave_layer_set_event_id
        $subart_slot000 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $RETURN_FLAG100 := $MARK_1
        call subarticulation_event_set_event_mark
        $i6 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $fade_time1 := %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]]
        call subarticulation_event_fade_in
        $current010400 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        call subarticulation_event_disallow_groups
        $fade_out_end01 := 0
        while($fade_out_end01 <= (%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id1]] - 1)) 
          $ii5 := 0

function delay_buffer_execute
  $i40 := 0
  $ii6 := 0
  $articulation_event_is_empty0 := 0
  $all_inactive0 := 1
  if($any_delay_event_queued = 1)
    $i40 := 0
    while($i40 <= $delay_buffer_highest_idx) 
      if(%delay_buffer[$i40] # -1)
        %delay_buffer_countdown[$i40] := %delay_buffer_countdown[$i40] - 5
        if(%delay_buffer_countdown[$i40] <= 0)
          if(%delay_buffer_velo[$i40] >= 0)
            $_short_circuit60 := 0
            $articulation_event_id1 := %delay_buffer[$i40]
            $subarticulation0 := %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i40]
            call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
            $_ret590 := $ret19
            if($_ret590 < 0)
              $_short_circuit60 := 1
            else
              if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%delay_buffer_instrument[$i40] * 32) + ((%delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i40] * 4) + %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i40])]]] = 9)
                $_short_circuit60 := 1
              end if
            end if
            if($_short_circuit60 = 1)
              $result53 := 0
              $instrument12 := %delay_buffer_instrument[$i40]
              $keyswitch12 := %delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i40]
              $subarticulation_idx7 := %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i40]
              $note14 := %delay_buffer_note[$i40]
              call get_next_rr
              $_ret600 := $ret28
              $instrument_slot4 := %delay_buffer_instrument[$i40]
              $keyswitch15 := %delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i40]
              $note15 := %delay_buffer_note[$i40]
              $subarticulation3 := %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i40]
              ~base1 := 1000000.
              call articulations_compute_modulation
              $rr10 := $ret25
              $trigger_clear010 := %delay_buffer_instrument[$i40]
              $i2810 := %delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i40]
              $is_active010 := %delay_buffer_note[$i40]
              $_ret2800 := %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i40]
              call articulations_compute_level
              $allow_repetitions00 := $i27010
              $articulation_event_id1 := %delay_buffer_prev_note[$i40]
              $subarticulation0 := %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i40]
              call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
              $fade_in_range001 := $ret19
              $instrument7 := %delay_buffer_instrument[$i40]

              $note9 := %delay_buffer_note[$i40]
              $velocity0 := %delay_buffer_velo[$i40]
              $interval1 := %delay_buffer_interval[$i40]
              $rr0 := $_ret600
              $modulation1 := $rr10
              $level1 := $allow_repetitions00
              $transpose0 := %octave_shift[%delay_buffer_instrument[$i40]] * 12
              $octave_layer0 := %octave_layer[%delay_buffer_instrument[$i40]]

              call subarticulation_play_note
              $result53 := $ret29

              $_ret6500 := $_ret650
              $_ret6600 := $_ret660

              message("articulation id " & %delay_buffer[$i40] & " already active")
            end if

                if(%delay_buffer[$i40] = %_last_articulation_event[(%delay_buffer_instrument[$i40] * 1024) + ((%delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i40] * 128) + %delay_buffer_note[$i40])])

                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
          %delay_buffer[$i40] := -1
        end if
        $all_inactive0 := 0
      else
        if($i40 = $delay_buffer_highest_idx)
          $delay_buffer_highest_idx := $delay_buffer_highest_idx - 1
        end if
      end if
      inc($i40)
    end while
    if($all_inactive0 = 1)
      $any_delay_event_queued := 0
    end if
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_update_tempo
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000)) / 960.
  if((~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 # ~tempo) or ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_LISTENER))
    $transition0 := 0
    $layer0 := 0
    $result6 := 0
    while($result6 <= 0) 
      $transition0 := 0
      while($transition0 <= 7) 
        $layer0 := 0
        while($layer0 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($result6 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($result6 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)]]] = 0) and (%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result6 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] > 0))
              %_repetition_interval_time[($result6 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + $layer0)] := int((60000. / ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000) * (4. / real(%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result6 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($layer0)
        end while
        inc($transition0)
      end while
      inc($result6)
    end while
    ~tempo := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_listener
  $result5 := 0
  $subarticulation0 := 0
  if($repetition_engine_active = 1)
    $i := 0
    while(($i < num_elements(%repetition_played_subarticulation_events)) and (%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i] # -1)) 
      %repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i] := -1
      inc($i)
    end while

      $articulation_event_id1 := %repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[$i]

        $subarticulation0 := 1

          $ret19 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$articulation_event_id1]]

          if(((((($ENGINE_UPTIME + %_repetition_interval_time_humanization[($ret19 * 4096) + (($ks7 * 512) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$articulation_event_id1])]) - $repetition_engine_start_time) mod $timing0) < 5) and ((($ENGINE_UPTIME - %subarticulation_event_last_used[$articulation_event_id1]) > ((($timing0 - %_articulation_humanization[($ret19 * 8) + $ks7]) - 5) - ($lookahead * $use_constant_delay))) or in_range($ENGINE_UPTIME - %pressed_keys[%subarticulation_event_note[$articulation_event_id1]], 5 + ($lookahead * $use_constant_delay), (5 + $timing0) + ($lookahead * $use_constant_delay)))) and ((%_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($ret19 * 128) + %subarticulation_event_note[$articulation_event_id1]] >= 0) or ($sustain_pedal = 1)))
            $result5 := 1
            %repetition_played_subarticulation_events[search(%repetition_played_subarticulation_events, -1)] := $articulation_event_id1
            $id3 := 0
            $instrument_slot4 := $ret19

            ~base1 := 127.
            call articulations_compute_modulation
            $_ret920 := $ret25

      end if

      $i := 0
      while(($i < num_elements(%repetition_played_subarticulation_events)) and (%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i] # -1))

      end while
    end if
    if($subarticulation0 = 0)
      $repetition_engine_active := 0
      $repetition_engine_start_time := -1
    end if
  end if
end function
function murmation_rng
  $articulation_event_id1 := 0
  $i330 := $NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING

  call switch
  $articulation_event_id1 := $i320
  $articulation_event_id1 := (8088405 * $articulation_event_id1) + 1
  $trigger_clear0100 := ((sh_right($articulation_event_id1, 8) .and. 16777215) mod (($ret19 - $i270100) + 1)) + $i270100
end function
function murmation_engine_listener
  if($any_murmation_active = 1)
    $murmation_listener_counter := ($murmation_listener_counter + 1) mod 5
    if($murmation_listener_counter = 0)
      $idx37 := 0
      $subarticulation_event0 := $ENGINE_UPTIME - $murmation_start_time
      $allow_repetitions0 := 100
      $note14 := 0
      $subarticulation_idx7 := 0
      $keyswitch12 := 0
      $any_murmation_active := 0
      $rr1 := 0
      while($rr1 <= 0) 
        $note14 := 0
        while($note14 <= 7) 
          $subarticulation_idx7 := 0
          while($subarticulation_idx7 <= 3) 
            if(%_murmation_active[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 1)
              $any_murmation_active := 1
              if(%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 0)
                $idx37 := 250
                $allow_repetitions0 := 50
              else
                $idx37 := (($DURATION_QUARTER * 4) / %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]) / 1000
                while($idx37 < 250) 
                  $idx37 := $idx37 * 2
                end while
              end if
              if(($subarticulation_event0 mod $idx37) < 25)
                if(%active_notes[$rr1] = 0)
                  %_murmation_active[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] := 0
                end if
                $keyswitch12 := 1
                $i270100 := 0
                $ret19 := 100
                call murmation_rng
                $instrument12 := $trigger_clear0100
                if($instrument12 <= $allow_repetitions0)
                  $ret28 := 0
                  $i270100 := 0
                  $ret19 := %active_notes[$rr1] - 1
                  call murmation_rng
                  $ret28 := $trigger_clear0100
                  $highest1 := -1
                  $lowest00 := 0
                  while($ret28 >= 0) 
                    $highest1 := search(%_pressed_notes_per_instrument, 1, (($rr1 * 128) + $highest1) + 1, ($rr1 * 128) + 128) mod 128
                    dec($ret28)
                  end while
                  $lowest00 := $highest1
                  $highest00 := 0
                  if($lowest00 # %articulation_event_note[%_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]])
                    $subarticulation3 := $rr1
                    $note15 := $note14
                    $keyswitch15 := $lowest00
                    call event_list_get_articulation_event
                    $s00 := $result8
                    if(%_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] # $s00)
                      $highest00 := 1
                    end if
                  end if
                  if($highest00 = 1)
                    $modulation_position0 := (($lookahead * $use_constant_delay) - %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]) + random(- %_articulation_humanization[($rr1 * 8) + $note14] / 2, %_articulation_humanization[($rr1 * 8) + $note14] / 2)
                    if(%_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] # -1)
                      if(abs(%articulation_event_note[%_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]] - $lowest00) <= %subarticulations_interval_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]])
                        $instrument1 := $rr1
                        $keyswitch1 := $note14
                        $subarticulation_idx1 := $subarticulation_idx7
                        $note2 := $lowest00
                        $layer0 := 0
                        $transition0 := abs(%articulation_event_note[%_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]] - $lowest00) + (- sh_right(- (%articulation_event_note[%_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]] - $lowest00), 31) * 12)
                        ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := 1. - (real(($ENGINE_UPTIME - %articulation_event_timestamp[%_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]) - ((($ENGINE_UPTIME - %articulation_event_timestamp[%_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]) - 500) .and. sh_right(500 - ($ENGINE_UPTIME - %articulation_event_timestamp[%_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]), 31))) / 500.)
                        $result6 := -1
                        if(((((($instrument1 >= 0) and ($instrument1 < 1)) and ($subarticulation_idx1 >= 0)) and ($subarticulation_idx1 < 4)) and ($note2 >= 0)) and ($note2 < 128))
                          if(($transition0 >= 0) and ($transition0 < 25))
                            $result6 := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($layer0 * 3200) + (($note2 * 25) + $transition0))))] + int(~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 * real(%_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($layer0 * 3200) + (($note2 * 25) + $transition0))))]))
                          else
                            if($transition0 = -1)
                              $result6 := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + ($layer0 * 3200)))] + int(~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 * real(%_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + ($layer0 * 3200)))]))
                            end if
                          end if
                        end if
                        $ret20 := $result6
                        $fade_in_start0 := $ret20
                        $modulation_position0 := $modulation_position0 - (200 - $fade_in_start0)
                      end if
                    end if
                    $subarticulation3 := $rr1
                    $note15 := $note14
                    $keyswitch15 := $lowest00
                    call event_list_get_articulation_event
                    $fade_in_range0 := $result8
                    $fade_time1 := $fade_in_range0
                    $RETURN_FLAG100 := $rr1
                    $subart_slot000 := $note14
                    $_iter910400 := $subarticulation_idx7
                    $_iter8010400 := $lowest00
                    $_iter910300 := 100
                    $_iter8010300 := 0
                    $time0 := $ENGINE_UPTIME
                    $countdown0 := 25 - ((25 - $modulation_position0) .and. sh_right(25 - $modulation_position0, 31))
                    $previous_note0 := %_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]
                    call delay_buffer_add
                    $subarticulation3 := $rr1
                    $note15 := $note14
                    $keyswitch15 := $lowest00
                    call event_list_get_articulation_event
                    %_current_murmation_event[($rr1 * 32) + (($note14 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] := $result8
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($subarticulation_idx7)
          end while
          inc($note14)
        end while
        inc($rr1)
      end while
      if($any_murmation_active = 0)
        $murmation_start_time := -1
        $murmation_highest_rate := 1
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_dynamic_range_cursor
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($layer0 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31) .or. sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
end function

end function
function subarticulation_group_count
  $lowest1 := 0
  if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$fade_time1]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$fade_time1]] = 9))
    $lowest1 := 6 * ((%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$fade_time1]] * 3) + %subarticulations_trans_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$fade_time1]])
  else
    $lowest1 := (6 * %subarticulations_interval_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$fade_time1]]) * ((%subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$fade_time1]] * %subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$fade_time1]]) * (1 + %subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$fade_time1]]))
  end if
  $i6 := $lowest1
end function

  set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$ii401], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $ii401])
end function

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs((- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_browser_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])

end function

function display_value_in_control_label
  !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  %idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  if($active_label_displays_ignore = 0)
    !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_control_par_str(%set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT)
    %idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%active_label_displays, %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    if(%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = -1)
      %idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%active_label_displays, -1)
      %active_label_displays[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      !active_label_displays_texts[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      message("set " & !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end if
    %active_label_displays_cb_ids[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    set_control_par_str(%set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & " " & !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    wait(1200000)
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = %active_label_displays_cb_ids[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      set_control_par_str(%set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !active_label_displays_texts[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      %active_label_displays[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := -1
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_mixer_channels
  $_ret28000 := 0

    $is_active0100 := %microphone_position_states[$_ret28000]
    if($_ret28000 >= 4)
      $is_active0100 := %microphone_position_states[$_ret28000 + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_off), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[abs(sh_right(abs($is_active0100) - 1, 31)) * 6])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_on), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[$is_active0100])
    end if
    $i28100 := abs(sh_right(abs($is_active0100) - 1, 31))
    set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[$_ret28000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i28100])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_name[$_ret28000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_large_white[$is_active0100])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_out[$_ret28000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[$is_active0100])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[$_ret28000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[$is_active0100])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[$_ret28000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_slider_pan" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $is_active0100])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$_ret28000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_slider_mixer" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $is_active0100])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[$_ret28000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $is_active0100])
    inc($_ret28000)
  end while
end function
function update_solo_selection
  $fade_in_range0 := 0
  $i28100 := 0
  while($i28100 <= 4) 
    if(get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[$i28100], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      $fade_in_range0 := 1
    end if
    inc($i28100)
  end while
  if($fade_in_range0 = 1)
    $i28100 := 0
    while($i28100 <= 4) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 396851 * get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[$i28100], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $i28100)
      inc($i28100)
    end while
  else
    $i28100 := 0
    while($i28100 <= 4) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 396851 * abs(sh_right(abs(get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[$i28100], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 1, 31)), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $i28100)
      inc($i28100)
    end while
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_load_category
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
  $selected_category := $is_active01000
  $_ret280000 := 0
  while($_ret280000 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
    if($_ret280000 = $is_active01000)
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    inc($_ret280000)
  end while
  $is_free1000 := 0
  $_ret280000 := 0
  while($_ret280000 <= 31) 
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] # -1)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        $is_free1000 := $_ret280000
      end if
    else
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $_ret280000
      $_ret280000 := 32
    end if
    inc($_ret280000)
  end while
  message("selected_idx: " & $is_free1000 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
  if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $is_free1000 := 0
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
    $is_free1000 := $is_free1000 - (($is_free1000 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $is_free1000, 31))
  end if
  $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $is_active01000
  $i270200 := $is_free1000
  $i2700000 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
  $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i2700000))
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i2700000
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  message("set scroll slider: " & $is_free1000)
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_browse")
end function
function move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
  $subarticulation_idx1 := 0
  $keyswitch1 := 0
  $instrument1 := 0
  $note2 := 0
  while($note2 <= 1) 
    $subarticulation_idx1 := 0
    while($subarticulation_idx1 <= 127) 
      $keyswitch1 := 0
      while($keyswitch1 <= 24) 
        %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        inc($keyswitch1)
      end while
      inc($subarticulation_idx1)
    end while
    inc($note2)
  end while
  $instrument1 := 0
  while($instrument1 <= 127) 
    %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[($result6 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + (($layer0 * 128) + $instrument1))] := %legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve[$instrument1]
    inc($instrument1)
  end while
end function
function load_kontakt_effects
  %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_SOLID_GEQ, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LF_FREQ, 10000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LF_GAIN, 150000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LMF_FREQ, 500000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LMF_GAIN, 150000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_HF_FREQ, 500000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_HF_GAIN, 400000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 440000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_STEREO, -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_GAINER, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL, 0, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_SEND_LEVELS, -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    inc(%i46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_2, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_3, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_RAUM, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY, 400000, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_LOWSHELF, 500000, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE, $FILTER_TYPE_EQ2BAND, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1, 365608, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW1, 480000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1, 530000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2, 761517, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW2, 122000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2, 471000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE, $FILTER_TYPE_EQ3BAND, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1, 209396, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW1, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2, 609890, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW2, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ3, 943843, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW3, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_SUPERGT, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_COMPRESS, 0, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_ATTACK, 250000, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_RELEASE, 700000, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
end function
function editor_page_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_browse")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end function
function mixer_page_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_mixer_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end function
function show_keyswitches
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_keyswitches), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$reduced_note0001])
end function
function authoring_close
  $btn_show_authoring_tools := 0
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_authoring), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  $authoring_page_active := 0
end function
function main_page_close
  call authoring_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end function
function update_mixer_eq
  $btn_mixer_eq_disable_input := $btn_mixer_eq_title
  $i28100 := abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_eq_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i28100])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_eq_title])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_eq_title])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_eq_title])
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31)), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
end function
function update_mixer_comp
  $btn_mixer_comp_disable_input := $btn_mixer_comp_title
  $i28100 := abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_comp_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i28100])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_comp_title])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_comp_title])
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31)), -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_COMPRESS, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_MIX, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
end function
function update_mixer_rev
  $btn_mixer_rev_disable_input := $btn_mixer_rev_title
  $i28100 := abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_rev_title) - 1, 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_rev_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i28100])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_rev_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_rev_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_rev_title])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_rev_title])
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_rev_title) - 1, 31)), -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
end function
function mixer_page_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_mixer_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  $btn_mixer_eq_title := abs(sh_right(abs(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)) - 1, 31))
  $btn_mixer_comp_title := abs(sh_right(abs(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)) - 1, 31))
  $btn_mixer_rev_title := abs(sh_right(abs(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)) - 1, 31))
  call update_mixer_eq
  call update_mixer_comp
  call update_mixer_rev
end function
function ks_articulation_browser_close
  $subarticulation_event0 := 0
  call PresetBrowser__show
end function
function update_main_buttons_display
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs((- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_browser_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_credits_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])
end function
function settings_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  call update_main_buttons_display
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
end function
function credits_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  call update_main_buttons_display
  $btn_sonu_logo := 0
end function
function credits_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  call update_main_buttons_display
  call settings_close
  $btn_sonu_logo := 1
end function
function settings_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  call update_main_buttons_display
  call credits_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
end function
function toggle_con_sordino
  $iii2 := 0
  while($iii2 <= 4) 
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($ii8) - 1, 31)), -1, 0, $iii2 + $NI_BUS_OFFSET)
    message("Con Sordino: " & $ii8 & " for channel " & $iii2)
    inc($iii2)
  end while
end function
function move_to_legato_buffer
  $layer0 := 0
  $transition0 := 0
  $result6 := 0
  $note2 := 0
  while($note2 <= 1) 
    $layer0 := 0
    while($layer0 <= 127) 
      $transition0 := 0
      while($transition0 <= 24) 
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset[($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note2 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        inc($transition0)
      end while
      inc($layer0)
    end while
    inc($note2)
  end while
  $result6 := 0
  while($result6 <= 127) 
    %legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve[$result6] := %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[($instrument1 * 4096) + (($keyswitch1 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 128) + $result6))]
    inc($result6)
  end while
end function
function dev_keys__get_preset_path
  $fade_in_start0 := 0
  while($fade_in_start0 = 0) 
    if($modulation_position0 = 1)
      @ret34 := @base_path
      $fade_in_start0 := 1
      continue
    else
      @ret34 := @preset_path
      $fade_in_start0 := 1
      continue
    end if
  end while
end function
function set_current_keyswitch_preset
  $subarticulation0 := %_keyswitch_preset[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]
  $articulation_event_id1 := 1
  call Preset______decr__
  %_keyswitch_preset[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := $result7
  $lowest00 := %_keyswitch_preset[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]
  $highest1 := 1
  call Preset______incr__
end function
function set_current_articulation_name
  !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := @name2
end function
function find_loaded_legato
  $authoring_page_active := 0
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[0] # -1)
    if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[0]]] = 2)
      $authoring_page_active := 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_authoring_legato_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[0]]] & " (" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0] & ")")
    end if
  end if
end function
function authoring_open
  call find_loaded_legato
  $i28100 := 60
  $is_active0100 := 60
  $_ret28000 := 0
  call update_authoring_transition
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_authoring), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  $fade_in_range0 := 0
  while($fade_in_range0 <= 127) 
    %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$fade_in_range0] := %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[$fade_in_range0]
    inc($fade_in_range0)
  end while
end function
function keyswitch_name_edit_show
  @txt_keyswitch_name := !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_keyswitch_name_edit), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$subarticulation_event0])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_name), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_event0) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_name_edit), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $subarticulation_event0)
end function
function update_keyswitch_volume_curve
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_subarticulation_selection
  $i330 := $selected_subarticulation
  $i320 := 0
  while($i320 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
    if($i320 # $i330)
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    inc($i320)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
    else
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 4)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_editor_overview) - 1)) 
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]]])
        set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
      else
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         Empty")
        set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[6])
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode := %_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if(((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5)) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
      $mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $btn_subarticulation_trans_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed = 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $rr1 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $allow_repetitions0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $subarticulation_event0 := int(round((real($rr1) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($rr1 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $idx37 := int((real($allow_repetitions0) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$subarticulation_event0] + $idx37)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $rr1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $allow_repetitions0)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  end if
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
