  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $layer0 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($layer0 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31) .or. sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
      $selected_subarticulation := 0
      $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
      $i330 := 0
      $i320 := 0
      while($i320 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
        if($i320 # $i330)
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($i320)
      end while
    end if
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      $is_active01000 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := $is_active01000
      $_ret280000 := 0
      while($_ret280000 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
        if($_ret280000 = $is_active01000)
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        inc($_ret280000)
      end while
      $is_free1000 := 0
      $_ret280000 := 0
      while($_ret280000 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] # -1)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            $is_free1000 := $_ret280000
          end if
        else
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $_ret280000
          $_ret280000 := 32
        end if
        inc($_ret280000)
      end while
      message("selected_idx: " & $is_free1000 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $is_free1000 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $is_free1000 := $is_free1000 - (($is_free1000 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $is_free1000, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $is_active01000
      $i270200 := $is_free1000
      $i2700000 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i2700000))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i2700000
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      message("set scroll slider: " & $is_free1000)
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    else
      $is_active01000 := 0
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := 0
      $_ret280000 := 0
      while($_ret280000 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
        if($_ret280000 = $is_active01000)
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        inc($_ret280000)
      end while
      $is_free1000 := 0
      $_ret280000 := 0
      while($_ret280000 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] # -1)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            $is_free1000 := $_ret280000
          end if
        else
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $_ret280000
          $_ret280000 := 32
        end if
        inc($_ret280000)
      end while
      message("selected_idx: " & $is_free1000 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $is_free1000 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $is_free1000 := $is_free1000 - (($is_free1000 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $is_free1000, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $is_active01000
      $i270200 := $is_free1000
      $i2700000 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i2700000))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i2700000
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      message("set scroll slider: " & $is_free1000)
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
  if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
    $selected_subarticulation := 0
    $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
    $i330 := 0
    $i320 := 0
    while($i320 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
      if($i320 # $i330)
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i320], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      end if
      inc($i320)
    end while
  end if
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
    $is_active01000 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    $selected_category := $is_active01000
    $_ret280000 := 0
    while($_ret280000 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
      if($_ret280000 = $is_active01000)
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      inc($_ret280000)
    end while
    $is_free1000 := 0
    $_ret280000 := 0
    while($_ret280000 <= 31) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] # -1)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          $is_free1000 := $_ret280000
        end if
      else
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $_ret280000
        $_ret280000 := 32
      end if
      inc($_ret280000)
    end while
    message("selected_idx: " & $is_free1000 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
    if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      $is_free1000 := 0
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
      $is_free1000 := $is_free1000 - (($is_free1000 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $is_free1000, 31))
    end if
    $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $is_active01000
    $i270200 := $is_free1000
    $i2700000 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
    $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i2700000))
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i2700000
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    message("set scroll slider: " & $is_free1000)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
  else
    $is_active01000 := 0
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    $selected_category := 0
    $_ret280000 := 0
    while($_ret280000 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
      if($_ret280000 = $is_active01000)
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$_ret280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      inc($_ret280000)
    end while
    $is_free1000 := 0
    $_ret280000 := 0
    while($_ret280000 <= 31) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] # -1)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($is_active01000 * 32) + $_ret280000)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          $is_free1000 := $_ret280000
        end if
      else
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $_ret280000
        $_ret280000 := 32
      end if
      inc($_ret280000)
    end while
    message("selected_idx: " & $is_free1000 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
    if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      $is_free1000 := 0
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
      $is_free1000 := $is_free1000 - (($is_free1000 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $is_free1000, 31))
    end if
    $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $is_active01000
    $i270200 := $is_free1000
    $i2700000 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
    $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i2700000 - (($i270200 * $i2700000) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i2700000))
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i2700000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i2700000
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    message("set scroll slider: " & $is_free1000)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_modwheel_assignment_control
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  end if
end function
function update_modwheel_assignment_circles
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $rr1 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $allow_repetitions0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $subarticulation_event0 := int(round((real($rr1) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($rr1 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $idx37 := int((real($allow_repetitions0) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$subarticulation_event0] + $idx37)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $rr1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $allow_repetitions0)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_dynamic_range_control
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $layer0 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($layer0 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31) .or. sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($layer0 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $layer0, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
end function
function center_circle_distance
  ~fade_level00 := ~fade_level0 - 0.5
  ~weight0 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 - 0.5
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := sqrt((~fade_level00 * ~fade_level00) + (~weight0 * ~weight0))
end function
function center_circle_angle
  ~fade_level0 := ~fade_level00 - 0.5
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 - 0.5
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 := ~fade_level0 / sqrt((~fade_level0 * ~fade_level0) + (~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 * ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000))
  ~fade_level01 := acos(~subarticulation_modulation_strength001)
  if(~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 < 0.)
    ~fade_level01 := (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI) - ~fade_level01
  end if
  ~weight0 := ~fade_level01
end function
function angle_to_value
  ~fade_level0 := ~fade_level01 + (~NI_MATH_PI / 2.)
  if(~fade_level0 > (~NI_MATH_PI * 2.))
    ~fade_level0 := ~fade_level0 - (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI)
  end if
  ~fade_level0 := abs(~fade_level0 - (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI))
  $subarticulation_event0 := int((127. * (~fade_level0 - ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001)) / (~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 - ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001))
end function
function update_keyswitch_settings
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_name), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_editor_keyswitch_icon), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_cc_slider_visibility
  if($use_expression = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end function
function set_key_colors
  $modulation_position0 := 0
  while($modulation_position0 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($modulation_position0, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($modulation_position0 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($modulation_position0 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($modulation_position0, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($modulation_position0)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function apply_scroll_offset
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function Preset______init__
  $Preset____free_idx := search(%Preset____allocation, 0)
  if($Preset____free_idx = -1)
    message("Error: No more free space available to allocate objects of type 'Preset'")
  end if
  %Preset____allocation[$Preset____free_idx] := 1
  %Preset____id[$Preset____free_idx] := $note14
  !Preset____name[$Preset____free_idx] := @name2
  $transition_note00 := %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx]
  $result710 := 1
  $_ret6500 := $transition_note00
  while($_ret6500 # -1) 
    $_sc_temp000 := 0
    %Floatmask____allocation[$_ret6500] := %Floatmask____allocation[$_ret6500] - $result710
    if(%Floatmask____allocation[$_ret6500] > 0)
      $_ret6500 := -1
      continue
    else
      %Floatmask____allocation[$_ret6500] := 0
    end if
    $transition_note00 := $_ret6500
    $_ret6500 := -1
    $_sc_temp000 := 0
    while($_sc_temp000 <= 1) 
      $fade_in_range001 := %_Floatmask____fm[($transition_note00 * 2) + $_sc_temp000]
      $fade_out_end001 := 1
      $result10 := $fade_in_range001
      while($result10 # -1) 
        $ret31 := 0
        %Bitlist____allocation[$result10] := %Bitlist____allocation[$result10] - $fade_out_end001
        if(%Bitlist____allocation[$result10] > 0)
          $result10 := -1
          continue
        else
          %Bitlist____allocation[$result10] := 0
        end if
        $fade_in_range001 := $result10
        $result10 := -1
        $allow_repetitions00 := $fade_in_range001
        $fade_in_start000 := 0
        if($allow_repetitions00 # -1)
          %Bitlist____val[$allow_repetitions00] := 0
        end if
      end while
      inc($_sc_temp000)
    end while
    $transition_type20 := $transition_note00
    if($transition_type20 # -1)
      $_iter17 := 0
      while($_iter17 <= 1) 
        %_Floatmask____fm[($transition_type20 * 2) + $_iter17] := -1
        inc($_iter17)
      end while
    end if
  end while
  %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx] := $keyswitch12
  $fade_out_end010 := %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx]
  $fade_in_range010 := 1
  if($fade_out_end010 # -1)
    %Floatmask____allocation[$fade_out_end010] := %Floatmask____allocation[$fade_out_end010] + $fade_in_range010
  end if
  %Preset____icon[$Preset____free_idx] := $idx37
  !Preset____file[$Preset____free_idx] := @ret1
  %Preset____deleted[$Preset____free_idx] := $layer0
  $subarticulation_idx7 := $Preset____free_idx
end function
function Preset____copy
  %Preset____id[$i28100] := %Preset____id[$ret28]
  !Preset____name[$i28100] := !Preset____name[$ret28]
  $transition_note00 := %Preset____tags[$i28100]
  $result710 := 1
  call Floatmask______decr__
  %Preset____tags[$i28100] := %Preset____tags[$ret28]
  $fade_out_end010 := %Preset____tags[$i28100]
  $fade_in_range010 := 1
  call Floatmask______incr__
  %Preset____icon[$i28100] := %Preset____icon[$ret28]
  !Preset____file[$i28100] := !Preset____file[$ret28]
  %Preset____deleted[$i28100] := %Preset____deleted[$ret28]
end function
function Browser____validate_user_preset_idx
  $keyswitch1 := 0
  while($keyswitch1 = 0) 
    $subarticulation_idx1 := 0
    while(($subarticulation_idx1 = 0) and ($keyswitch1 = 0)) 
      $note2 := 0
      $_ret83001 := 0
      while((($_ret83001 < %Browser____num_user_presets[$i281000]) and ($subarticulation_idx1 = 0)) and ($keyswitch1 = 0)) 
        %user_preset_numbers[$_ret83001] := %Preset____id[%_Browser____user_presets[($i281000 * 500) + $_ret83001]]
        inc($_ret83001)
      end while
      if($keyswitch1 = 1)
        continue
      end if
      if($subarticulation_idx1 = 1)
        continue
      end if
      if(search(%user_preset_numbers, $instrument1) # -1)
        $_ret83001 := 0
        $note2 := 1
        while((($note2 = 1) and ($subarticulation_idx1 = 0)) and ($keyswitch1 = 0)) 
          if(search(%user_preset_numbers, $_ret83001 + 999) # -1)
            inc($_ret83001)
          else
            $note2 := 0
          end if
        end while
        if($keyswitch1 = 1)
          continue
        end if
        if($subarticulation_idx1 = 1)
          continue
        end if
        $result80 := $_ret83001 + 999
        $keyswitch1 := 1
        continue
        $subarticulation_idx1 := 1
        continue
      end if
      $result80 := $instrument1
      $keyswitch1 := 1
      continue
      $subarticulation_idx1 := 1
      continue
    end while
    if($keyswitch1 = 1)
      continue
    end if
  end while
end function
function Browser____clear_user_arrays
  $subarticulation_idx2 := $transition_type0
  while($subarticulation_idx2 < $note4) 
    %user_preset_tags0[$subarticulation_idx2] := 0
    %user_preset_tags1[$subarticulation_idx2] := 0
    !user_preset_titles[$subarticulation_idx2] := ""
    %user_deleted_presets[$subarticulation_idx2] := 0
    %user_preset_numbers[$subarticulation_idx2] := 0
    %user_preset_info[$subarticulation_idx2] := 0
    inc($subarticulation_idx2)
  end while
end function
function Browser____clear_preset_arrays
  $i360 := $event0
  while($i360 < $i36) 
    !preset_title_array[$i360] := ""
    %preset_tags0[$i360] := 0
    %preset_tags1[$i360] := 0
    %preset_numbers_array[$i360] := 0
    %preset_info[$i360] := 0
    !file_name_array[$i360] := ""
    inc($i360)
  end while
end function
function Browser____update_user_preset_situation

    $i331 := %Browser____num_factory_presets[$group_count000]
    while($i331 < %Browser____num_presets[$group_count000]) 
      %_Browser____presets[($group_count000 * 1499) + $i331] := -1
      inc($i331)
    end while
    $i331 := 0
    while($i331 < %Browser____num_user_presets[$group_count000]) 
      $ii400 := %_Browser____user_presets[($group_count000 * 500) + $i331]
      $lowest00 := $ii400
      $highest1 := 1
      if($lowest00 # -1)
        %Preset____allocation[$lowest00] := %Preset____allocation[$lowest00] + $highest1

      if(($ii400 # -1) and (%Preset____deleted[$ii400] = 0))
        $subarticulation0 := %_Browser____presets[($group_count000 * 1499) + (%Browser____num_factory_presets[$group_count000] + $i331)]
        $articulation_event_id1 := 1
        $ret19 := $subarticulation0
        while($ret19 # -1) 
          $i270100 := 0
          %Preset____allocation[$ret19] := %Preset____allocation[$ret19] - $articulation_event_id1
          if(%Preset____allocation[$ret19] > 0)
            $ret19 := -1
            continue
          else
            %Preset____allocation[$ret19] := 0
          end if
          $subarticulation0 := $ret19
          $ret19 := -1
          $transition_note00 := %Preset____tags[$subarticulation0]
          $result710 := 1
          $_ret6500 := $transition_note00
          while($_ret6500 # -1) 
            $_sc_temp000 := 0

            if(%Floatmask____allocation[$_ret6500] > 0)
              $_ret6500 := -1
              continue
            else
              %Floatmask____allocation[$_ret6500] := 0
            end if
            $transition_note00 := $_ret6500
            $_ret6500 := -1
            $_sc_temp000 := 0
            while($_sc_temp000 <= 1) 
              $fade_in_range001 := %_Floatmask____fm[($transition_note00 * 2) + $_sc_temp000]
              $fade_out_end001 := 1
              $result10 := $fade_in_range001
              while($result10 # -1) 
                $ret31 := 0

                if(%Bitlist____allocation[$result10] > 0)
                  $result10 := -1
                  continue
                else
                  %Bitlist____allocation[$result10] := 0
                end if
                $fade_in_range001 := $result10

                $allow_repetitions00 := $fade_in_range001

            end while
            $transition_type20 := $transition_note00
            if($transition_type20 # -1)
              $_iter17 := 0

                %_Floatmask____fm[($transition_type20 * 2) + $_iter17] := -1
                inc($_iter17)
              end while
            end if
          end while
          $allow_repetitions0 := $subarticulation0
          $rr1 := 0

            %Preset____deleted[$allow_repetitions0] := 0
            !Preset____file[$allow_repetitions0] := ""
            %Preset____tags[$allow_repetitions0] := -1
            !Preset____name[$allow_repetitions0] := ""
            %Preset____id[$allow_repetitions0] := 0
            %Preset____icon[$allow_repetitions0] := 0
          end if
        end while
        %_Browser____presets[($group_count000 * 1499) + (%Browser____num_factory_presets[$group_count000] + $i331)] := $ii400
        $lowest00 := %_Browser____presets[($group_count000 * 1499) + (%Browser____num_factory_presets[$group_count000] + $i331)]
        $highest1 := 1

          %Preset____allocation[$lowest00] := %Preset____allocation[$lowest00] + $highest1
        end if
        message("User preset: " & ", " & !Preset____name[$ii400] & ", " & " with idx: " & ", " & %Preset____id[$ii400] & ", " & " added to presets array")
      end if
      $subarticulation0 := $ii400
      $articulation_event_id1 := 1
      $ret19 := $subarticulation0
      while($ret19 # -1) 
        $i270100 := 0
        %Preset____allocation[$ret19] := %Preset____allocation[$ret19] - $articulation_event_id1

end function
function PresetBrowser__save_preset_array
  $result8 := 6
  $subarticulation3 := $selected_instrument
  $note15 := $selected_keyswitch
  $keyswitch15 := 6
  %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_volume_min[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
  inc($keyswitch15)
  %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_volume_max[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
  inc($keyswitch15)
  %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_volume_curve[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
  inc($keyswitch15)
  %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_humanization[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
  inc($keyswitch15)
  %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_release[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
  inc($keyswitch15)
  %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_icon[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
  inc($keyswitch15)
  %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
  inc($keyswitch15)
  $instrument_slot4 := 0
  while($instrument_slot4 <= 3) 
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_vibrato[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    inc($instrument_slot4)
  end while
end function

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_dev_save), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[1 + sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_save_dialog), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE)) - 1, 31)])
end function
function Browser____set_current_preset
  $subarticulation0 := %Browser____last[$all_inactive0]
  $articulation_event_id1 := 1
  call Preset______decr__
  %Browser____last[$all_inactive0] := %Browser____current[$all_inactive0]
  $lowest00 := %Browser____last[$all_inactive0]
  $highest1 := 1
  call Preset______incr__
  $subarticulation0 := %Browser____current[$all_inactive0]
  $articulation_event_id1 := 1
  call Preset______decr__
  %Browser____current[$all_inactive0] := %_Browser____filtered_presets[($all_inactive0 * 1499) + $articulation_event_is_empty0]
  $lowest00 := %Browser____current[$all_inactive0]
  $highest1 := 1
  call Preset______incr__
end function
function Preset____set_favorite
  $set_articulation_event_id00 := %Preset____tags[$ret28]
  $articulation_event_id50 := 15
  $i310 := $i28100
  %Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($set_articulation_event_id00 * 2) + ($articulation_event_id50 / 32)]] := (%Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($set_articulation_event_id00 * 2) + ($articulation_event_id50 / 32)]] .and. .not. 65536) .or. sh_left($i310, 16)
end function
function Scrollarea__is_idx_on_sight
  $subarticulation_idx7 := 0
  while($subarticulation_idx7 = 0) 
    $rr1 := $scroll__up
    $allow_repetitions0 := $scroll__up + 18
    if(($note14 >= $rr1) and ($note14 < $allow_repetitions0))
      $keyswitch12 := 1
      $subarticulation_idx7 := 1
      continue
    else
      $keyswitch12 := 0
      $subarticulation_idx7 := 1
      continue
    end if
  end while
end function

on note
  ignore_event($EVENT_ID)
  set_key_pressed($EVENT_NOTE, 1)
  %id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $EVENT_NOTE
  call keyswitches_on_note
  if(($EVENT_NOTE >= %nki_range[0]) and ($EVENT_NOTE <= %nki_range[1]))
    $last_note_input_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    if(%pressed_keys[$EVENT_NOTE] = -1)
      %pressed_keys[$EVENT_NOTE] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
      %last_pressed[$EVENT_NOTE] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
      %key_velocity[$EVENT_NOTE] := $EVENT_VELOCITY
      inc($num_pressed_keys)
    end if
    $last_on_note_callback := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $NOTE_SELECTION_TIME * 1000
    call wait_or_zero
    if($last_on_note_callback = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
      call update_selected_notes
      $_iter91401 := $_iter91401
    end if
  end if
  if(in_range($EVENT_NOTE, $keyswitch_octave * 12, (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1) and ($btn_fade_ks = 1))
    %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := int((real(abs($EVENT_VELOCITY - 128)) / 127.) * 2500.)
    call trigger_ks_fade
    $_iter801501 := $_iter801501
    $i30001 := $i30001
  end if
end on
on release
  if(get_event_mark($EVENT_ID, $MARK_1) = 0)
    $last_release_callback := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    ignore_event($EVENT_ID)
    %pressed_keys[$EVENT_NOTE] := -1
    %last_released[$EVENT_NOTE] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    dec($num_pressed_keys)
    if($sustain_pedal = 0)
      set_key_pressed($EVENT_NOTE, 0)
      $_ret83001 := $EVENT_NOTE
      call keyswitches_on_release
      message("release " & $EVENT_NOTE)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 0) 
        $modulation0 := $i
        $subarticulation_event_id10 := $EVENT_NOTE
        call articulations_note_off
        $i281001 := $ii4
        inc($i)
      end while
      %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $NOTE_SELECTION_TIME * 1000
      call wait_or_zero
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 0) 
        %_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($last_release_callback = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
        call update_selected_notes
        $trigger_clear01001 := $trigger_clear01001
        $_iter801401 := $_iter801401
      end if
    end if
  end if
end on
on controller
  ignore_controller
  %controller_value[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 1000] := %CC[$CC_NUM]
  $last_controller_callback := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  if($CC_NUM = 1)
    $fade_in_start0 := %CC[1]
    call buffer_modwheel_animation
  end if
  if($CC_NUM = 64)
    if(%CC[64] > 63)
      $sustain_pedal_actual := 1
    else
      $sustain_pedal_actual := 0
      $sustain_pedal := 0
      $i := %nki_range[0]
      while($i <= %nki_range[1]) 
        if(%pressed_keys[$i] = -1)
          $ii := 0
          while($ii <= 0) 
            if(%_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($ii * 128) + $i] = 1)
              $modulation0 := $ii
              $subarticulation_event_id10 := $i
              call articulations_note_off
              $_iter801401 := $ii4
            end if
            inc($ii)
          end while
          set_key_pressed($i, 0)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ($lookahead * 1000) * $use_constant_delay
  call wait_or_zero
  $sustain_pedal := $sustain_pedal_actual
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%repeat1) - 1)) 
    %repeat1[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  if($CC_NUM = 1)
    message("modwheel: " & %controller_value[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 1000])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_modwheel_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %controller_value[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 1000])
    $reduced_note0000 := 0
    $string0000 := %controller_value[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 1000]
    call set_modulation_position
    while(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1) 
      $previous_note0 := -1
      $countdown0 := 1
      call cc_on_controller
      %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $idx34
      %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (1 + sh_right(abs($mnu_cc_smoothing) - 1, 31)) * 20000
      call wait_or_zero
      if($last_controller_callback # $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
        %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      end if
    end while
  end if
  if(($CC_NUM = $mnu_cc11) and ($use_expression = 1))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %CC[$mnu_cc11])
    $expression_position := int((real(%CC[$CC_NUM]) * 1000000.) / 127.)
    while(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1) 
      $previous_note0 := -1
      $countdown0 := 1
      call cc_on_controller
      %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $idx34
      $_iter801501 := $output_type0
      %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (1 + sh_right(abs($mnu_cc_smoothing) - 1, 31)) * 20000
      call wait_or_zero
      if($last_controller_callback # $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
        %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      end if
    end while
  end if
end on

end on

  if($mnu_authoring_edit_all > 0)
    $result11000 := ((abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer) * 128) * 25
    $transition_type200 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1
    $i := $result11000
    while($i <= $transition_type200) 
      %_legato_data_sus_release_time[$i] := $sli_sustain_release
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($vlue_authoring_start_note * 25) + (abs($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note) + (- sh_right(- ($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note), 31) * 12)))] := $sli_sustain_release
  end if
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_sustain_release & " + " & $sli_sustain_release_offset & " ms")
end on

  if($mnu_authoring_edit_all > 0)
    $transition_type200 := ((abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer) * 128) * 25
    $result11000 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1

    end while
  else
    %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($vlue_authoring_start_note * 25) + (abs($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note) + (- sh_right(- ($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note), 31) * 12)))] := $sli_trans_start_offset
  end if
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_start), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_trans_start & " + " & $sli_trans_start_offset & " ms")
end on
on ui_control($sli_trans_fadeIn)
  if($mnu_authoring_edit_all > 0)
    $result11000 := ((abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer) * 128) * 25
    $transition_type200 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1
    $i := $result11000
    while($i <= $transition_type200) 
      %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[$i] := $sli_trans_fadeIn
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($vlue_authoring_start_note * 25) + (abs($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note) + (- sh_right(- ($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note), 31) * 12)))] := $sli_trans_fadeIn

end on

on ui_control($btn_save_authoring)
  if($authoring_page_active = 1)
    $instrument1 := 0
    $keyswitch1 := 0
    $subarticulation_idx1 := 0
    call move_to_legato_buffer
    @name2 := "leg" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0]
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_fade_in_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_release_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_wait_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_zone_start.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_zone_wait.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_fade_in_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_release_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_wait_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_zone_start_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_zone_wait_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_all_transitions_volume_curve.nka")
  else
    message("No Legato Loaded")
  end if
  $btn_save_authoring := 0
end on
on ui_control($btn_load_authoring)
  if($authoring_page_active = 1)
    !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "leg" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0]
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka_offset"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_all_transitions_volume_curve.nka"))
    $result6 := 0
    $transition0 := 0
    $layer0 := 0
    call move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
    $i28100 := 60
    $is_active0100 := 60
    $_ret28000 := 0
    call update_authoring_transition
  else
    message("No Legato Loaded")
  end if
  $btn_load_authoring := 0
end on
on ui_control($btn_authoring_smooth_table)
  $transition_type200 := 0
  $i2701001 := 0
  $result11000 := 0
  while($result11000 <= 127) 
    if($result11000 > 0)
      $transition_type200 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$result11000 - 1]
    else
      $transition_type200 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[0]
    end if

            wait_async(load_array_str(%legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_all_transitions_volume_curve.nka"))
            $result6 := %inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
            $transition0 := %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
            $layer0 := %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
            call move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
            message("Reloaded Legato for Instrument: " & %inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ", Keyswitch: " & %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ", Subarticulation: " & %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end if
        end if
        inc(%k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      inc(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    inc(%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  $btn_dev_reload_all_legatos := 0
end on
on ui_control($btn_mixer_preset_save)
  if($btn_mixer_preset_save = 1)
    %mixer_preset_array[0] := -212121
    %mixer_preset_array[1] := 0
    %mixer_preset_array[2] := 1
    %mixer_preset_array[3] := - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)
    $fade_in_start0 := 0
    while($fade_in_start0 <= 4) 
      %mixer_preset_array[4 + $fade_in_start0] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[$fade_in_start0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[9 + $fade_in_start0] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$fade_in_start0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[14 + $fade_in_start0] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[$fade_in_start0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[19 + $fade_in_start0] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[$fade_in_start0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[24 + $fade_in_start0] := get_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$fade_in_start0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      inc($fade_in_start0)
    end while
    %mixer_preset_array[29] := $btn_mixer_eq_title
    %mixer_preset_array[30] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[31] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[32] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[33] := $btn_mixer_comp_title
    %mixer_preset_array[34] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[35] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[36] := $btn_mixer_rev_title
    %mixer_preset_array[37] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_rev_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[38] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[39] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    save_array(%mixer_preset_array, 0)
    $btn_mixer_preset_save := 0
  else
    $btn_mixer_preset_save := 1
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_mixer_preset_load)
  if($btn_mixer_preset_load = 1)
    wait_async(load_array(%mixer_preset_array, 0))
    %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    if(%mixer_preset_array[0] # -212121)
      %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)
      !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "This is not a valid mixer preset file."
      !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
      call display_value_in_control_label
      %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
    end if
    if(%mixer_preset_array[1] # 0)

    if(%mixer_preset_array[2] # 1)

        set_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[%i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[24 + %i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
        inc(%i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      $btn_mixer_eq_title := %mixer_preset_array[29]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[30])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[31])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[32])
      $btn_mixer_comp_title := %mixer_preset_array[33]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[34])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[35])

        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)

          %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0

          end while

          message("execute purge command")
          $i42 := 0

            inc($_iter0)
          end while
          $allow_repetitions0 := 0
          $rr1 := 0
          while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
            inc($rr1)
          end while
          $i42 := 0
          while($i42 <= 0) 
            $ii8 := 0
            while($ii8 <= 7) 
              $iii2 := 0
              while($iii2 <= 3) 
                if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)

                end if
                inc($iii2)
              end while
              inc($ii8)
            end while
            inc($i42)
          end while
          $i42 := 0
          while($i42 <= 511) 
            message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
            if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
              message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
              if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
                if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
                  $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                  $lowest00 := 0
                  $i := 0

                  $highest00 := $i6
                  while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                    purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                    inc($i)
                    $fade_time1 := $highest1
                    call subarticulation_group_count
                    $highest00 := $i6
                  end while
                  $i331 := $highest00
                  message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($i42)
          end while
          $i42 := 0

            if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)

                  $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                  $lowest00 := 1
                  $i := 0
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6

                    inc($i)
                    $fade_time1 := $highest1
                    call subarticulation_group_count
                    $highest00 := $i6
                  end while
                  $i331 := $highest00
                  message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
                end if
              end if
            end if

          end while
        end if

                end if

                  $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]

        end if
        %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %sli_mixer_channel_volume[%idx46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]

          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]

          !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"

          !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "microphone_position_states[" & num_elements(%microphone_position_states) & "]: "

          $i42 := 0

            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
            inc($_iter0)
          end while

          while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0))

            inc($rr1)
          end while
          $i42 := 0

            $ii8 := 0

              $iii2 := 0

                if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
                  %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
                end if
                inc($iii2)
              end while
              inc($ii8)
            end while
            inc($i42)
          end while
          $i42 := 0

              if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
                if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
                  $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                  $lowest00 := 0
                  $i := 0
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                  while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                    purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                    inc($i)
                    $fade_time1 := $highest1
                    call subarticulation_group_count
                    $highest00 := $i6
                  end while
                  $i331 := $highest00
                  message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($i42)
          end while

        %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_solo, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
          set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
            %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
              set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
              inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
            set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
          end if
          call update_solo_selection
        end if
        %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_mute, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
          set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))

            %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0
          end if

          !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "microphone_position_states[" & num_elements(%microphone_position_states) & "]: "

            inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          message(!___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          call update_mixer_channels
          message("execute purge command")
          $i42 := 0
          $ii8 := 0
          $iii2 := 0
          $_iter0 := 0
          while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
            inc($_iter0)
          end while
          $allow_repetitions0 := 0
          $rr1 := 0
          while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
            inc($rr1)
          end while
          $i42 := 0
          while($i42 <= 0) 
            $ii8 := 0
            while($ii8 <= 7) 
              $iii2 := 0
              while($iii2 <= 3) 
                if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
                  %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
                end if
                inc($iii2)
              end while
              inc($ii8)
            end while
            inc($i42)
          end while
          $i42 := 0
          while($i42 <= 511) 
            message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
            if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
              message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
              if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
                if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
                  $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                  $lowest00 := 0
                  $i := 0
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                  while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                    purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                    inc($i)
                    $fade_time1 := $highest1
                    call subarticulation_group_count
                    $highest00 := $i6
                  end while
                  $i331 := $highest00
                  message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($i42)
          end while
          $i42 := 0
          while($i42 <= 511)
