                    inc($i)
                    $fade_time1 := $highest1
                    call subarticulation_group_count
                    $highest00 := $i6
                  end while
                  $i331 := $highest00
                  message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($i42)
          end while
        end if
        %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
          if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4)
            %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
          else
            %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0
          end if
          call update_mixer_channels
          message("execute purge command")
          $i42 := 0
          $ii8 := 0
          $iii2 := 0
          $_iter0 := 0
          while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
            inc($_iter0)
          end while
          $allow_repetitions0 := 0
          $rr1 := 0
          while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
            inc($rr1)
          end while
          $i42 := 0
          while($i42 <= 0) 
            $ii8 := 0
            while($ii8 <= 7) 
              $iii2 := 0
              while($iii2 <= 3) 
                if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
                  %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
                end if
                inc($iii2)
              end while
              inc($ii8)
            end while
            inc($i42)
          end while
          $i42 := 0
          while($i42 <= 511) 
            message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
            if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
              message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
              if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
                if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
                  $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                  $lowest00 := 0
                  $i := 0
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                  while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                    purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                    inc($i)
                    $fade_time1 := $highest1
                    call subarticulation_group_count
                    $highest00 := $i6
                  end while
                  $i331 := $highest00
                  message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($i42)
          end while
          $i42 := 0
          while($i42 <= 511) 
            if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
              if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
                if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] > 0)
                  $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                  $lowest00 := 1
                  $i := 0
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                  while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                    purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                    inc($i)
                    $fade_time1 := $highest1
                    call subarticulation_group_count
                    $highest00 := $i6
                  end while
                  $i331 := $highest00
                  message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($i42)
          end while
        end if
        %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_pan, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_STEREO_PAN, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end if
        %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_solo, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
          set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
            %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
              set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
              inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
            set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
          end if
          call update_solo_selection
        end if
        %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_mute, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
          set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
            %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
              set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
              inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
            set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
          end if
          call update_solo_selection
        end if
        %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
          call display_value_in_control_label
        end if
        %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%mnu_mixer_channel_out, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, get_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) - 1, -1, -1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end if
        inc(%idx46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      call update_mixer_eq
      call update_mixer_comp
      call update_mixer_rev
      %id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $mnu_mixer_rev_preset
      wait_async(load_array_str(%reverb_preset_array, @REVERB_PRESET_PATH & "reverb_preset" & %id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ".nka"))
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_TYPE, %reverb_preset_array[0], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY, %reverb_preset_array[1], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY_UNIT, %reverb_preset_array[2], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_FEEDBACK, %reverb_preset_array[3], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_LOWSHELF, %reverb_preset_array[4], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_HIGHCUT, %reverb_preset_array[5], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY, %reverb_preset_array[6], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_MOD, %reverb_preset_array[7], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_REVERB, %reverb_preset_array[8], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DIFFUSION, %reverb_preset_array[9], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_SIZE, %reverb_preset_array[10], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DAMPING, %reverb_preset_array[11], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_RATE, %reverb_preset_array[12], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_FREEZE, %reverb_preset_array[13], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_SPARSE, %reverb_preset_array[14], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
      call mixer_page_open
      $active_label_displays_ignore := 0
    end if
    $btn_mixer_preset_load := 0
  else
    $btn_mixer_preset_load := 1
  end if
end on
on ui_control($mnu_mixer_preset)
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(!preset_path0) - 1)) 
    !preset_path0[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  !preset_path0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := @mixer_path & get_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_preset), $mnu_mixer_preset) & ".nka"
  message("Loading mixer preset: " & !preset_path0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "")
  wait_async(load_array_str(%mixer_preset_array, !preset_path0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
  %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  if(%mixer_preset_array[0] # -212121)
    %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)
    !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "This is not a valid mixer preset file."
    !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    call display_value_in_control_label
    %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  end if
  if(%mixer_preset_array[1] # 0)
    %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)
    !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Loaded mixer preset file from incompatible product."
    !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    call display_value_in_control_label
    %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  end if
  if(%mixer_preset_array[2] # 1)
    %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)
    !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Loaded mixer preset file has an incompatible version."
    !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    call display_value_in_control_label
    %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  end if
  if(%mixer_preset_array[3] # - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31))
    %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)
    !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Loaded mixer preset file has an incompatible type."
    !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    call display_value_in_control_label
    %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  end if
  if(%abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 0)
    %i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
      set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[4 + %i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      set_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[%i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[9 + %i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      set_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[%i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[14 + %i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      set_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[%i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[19 + %i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      set_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[%i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[24 + %i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      inc(%i50[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    $btn_mixer_eq_title := %mixer_preset_array[29]
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[30])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[31])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[32])
    $btn_mixer_comp_title := %mixer_preset_array[33]
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[34])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[35])
    $btn_mixer_rev_title := %mixer_preset_array[36]
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_rev_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[37])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[38])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[39])
    $active_label_displays_ignore := 1
    %idx46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %idx46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%idx46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
      %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_volume, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
        call display_value_in_control_label
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_enable, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4)
          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        else

          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0
        end if
        message("idx: " & %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ", " & "value: " & get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
        !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "microphone_position_states[" & num_elements(%microphone_position_states) & "]: "
        %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < num_elements(%microphone_position_states)) 
          !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & %microphone_position_states[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] & ", "
          inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        message(!___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        call update_mixer_channels
        message("execute purge command")
        $i42 := 0
        $ii8 := 0
        $iii2 := 0
        $_iter0 := 0
        while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
          inc($_iter0)
        end while
        $allow_repetitions0 := 0

        while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
          inc($rr1)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 0) 
          $ii8 := 0
          while($ii8 <= 7) 
            $iii2 := 0
            while($iii2 <= 3) 
              if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
                %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
              end if
              inc($iii2)
            end while
            inc($ii8)
          end while
          inc($i42)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 511) 
          message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
            message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
            if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
              if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
                $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                $lowest00 := 0
                $i := 0
                $fade_time1 := $highest1
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $highest00 := $i6
                while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                  purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                  inc($i)
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                end while
                $i331 := $highest00
                message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
              end if
            end if
          end if
          inc($i42)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 511) 
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
            if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
              if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] > 0)
                $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                $lowest00 := 1
                $i := 0
                $fade_time1 := $highest1
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $highest00 := $i6
                while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                  purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                  inc($i)
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                end while
                $i331 := $highest00
                message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
              end if
            end if
          end if
          inc($i42)
        end while
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4)
          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        else
          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0
        end if
        call update_mixer_channels
        message("execute purge command")
        $i42 := 0
        $ii8 := 0
        $iii2 := 0
        $_iter0 := 0
        while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
          inc($_iter0)
        end while
        $allow_repetitions0 := 0
        $rr1 := 0
        while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
          inc($rr1)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 0) 
          $ii8 := 0
          while($ii8 <= 7) 
            $iii2 := 0
            while($iii2 <= 3) 
              if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
                %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
              end if
              inc($iii2)
            end while
            inc($ii8)
          end while
          inc($i42)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 511) 
          message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
            message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
            if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
              if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
                $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                $lowest00 := 0
                $i := 0
                $fade_time1 := $highest1
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $highest00 := $i6
                while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                  purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                  inc($i)
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                end while
                $i331 := $highest00
                message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
              end if
            end if
          end if
          inc($i42)
        end while

                $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                $lowest00 := 1
                $i := 0

                $highest00 := $i6

          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
          inc($_iter0)
        end while
        $allow_repetitions0 := 0
        $rr1 := 0
        while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
          inc($rr1)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 0) 
          $ii8 := 0
          while($ii8 <= 7) 
            $iii2 := 0
            while($iii2 <= 3) 
              if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
                %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
              end if
              inc($iii2)
            end while
            inc($ii8)
          end while
          inc($i42)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 511) 
          message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
            message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
            if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
              if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
                $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                $lowest00 := 0
                $i := 0
                $fade_time1 := $highest1
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $highest00 := $i6
                while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                  purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                  inc($i)
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                end while
                $i331 := $highest00
                message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
              end if
            end if
          end if
          inc($i42)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 511) 
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
            if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)

        if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
          %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
            set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
        end if
        call update_solo_selection
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
        call display_value_in_control_label
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%mnu_mixer_channel_out, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, get_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) - 1, -1, -1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end if
      %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %mnu_mixer_channel_out[%idx46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_volume, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
        call display_value_in_control_label
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_enable, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4)
          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        else
          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0
        end if
        message("idx: " & %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ", " & "value: " & get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
        !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "microphone_position_states[" & num_elements(%microphone_position_states) & "]: "
        %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < num_elements(%microphone_position_states)) 
          !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & %microphone_position_states[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] & ", "
          inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        message(!___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        call update_mixer_channels
        message("execute purge command")
        $i42 := 0
        $ii8 := 0
        $iii2 := 0
        $_iter0 := 0
        while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
          inc($_iter0)
        end while
        $allow_repetitions0 := 0
        $rr1 := 0
        while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
          inc($rr1)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 0) 
          $ii8 := 0
          while($ii8 <= 7) 
            $iii2 := 0
            while($iii2 <= 3) 
              if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
                %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
              end if
              inc($iii2)
            end while
            inc($ii8)
          end while
          inc($i42)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 511) 
          message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
            message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
            if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
              if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
                $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                $lowest00 := 0
                $i := 0
                $fade_time1 := $highest1
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $highest00 := $i6
                while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                  purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                  inc($i)
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                end while
                $i331 := $highest00
                message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
              end if
            end if
          end if
          inc($i42)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 511) 
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
            if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
              if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] > 0)
                $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                $lowest00 := 1
                $i := 0
                $fade_time1 := $highest1
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $highest00 := $i6
                while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                  purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                  inc($i)
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                end while
                $i331 := $highest00
                message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
              end if
            end if
          end if
          inc($i42)
        end while
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4)
          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        else
          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0
        end if
        call update_mixer_channels
        message("execute purge command")
        $i42 := 0
        $ii8 := 0
        $iii2 := 0
        $_iter0 := 0
        while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
          inc($_iter0)
        end while
        $allow_repetitions0 := 0
        $rr1 := 0
        while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
          inc($rr1)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 0) 
          $ii8 := 0
          while($ii8 <= 7) 
            $iii2 := 0
            while($iii2 <= 3) 
              if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
                %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
              end if
              inc($iii2)
            end while
            inc($ii8)
          end while
          inc($i42)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 511) 
          message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
            message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
            if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
              if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
                $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                $lowest00 := 0
                $i := 0
                $fade_time1 := $highest1
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $highest00 := $i6
                while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                  purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                  inc($i)
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                end while
                $i331 := $highest00
                message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
              end if
            end if
          end if
          inc($i42)
        end while
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= 511) 
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
            if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
              if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] > 0)
                $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                $lowest00 := 1
                $i := 0
                $fade_time1 := $highest1
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $highest00 := $i6
                while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                  purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                  inc($i)
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                end while
                $i331 := $highest00
                message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
              end if
            end if
          end if
          inc($i42)
        end while
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_pan, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_STEREO_PAN, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_solo, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
          %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
            set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
        end if
        call update_solo_selection
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_mute, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
          %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
            set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
        end if
        call update_solo_selection
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
        call display_value_in_control_label
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%mnu_mixer_channel_out, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, get_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) - 1, -1, -1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end if
      inc(%idx46[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    call update_mixer_eq
    call update_mixer_comp
    call update_mixer_rev
    %id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $mnu_mixer_rev_preset
    wait_async(load_array_str(%reverb_preset_array, @REVERB_PRESET_PATH & "reverb_preset" & %id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ".nka"))
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_TYPE, %reverb_preset_array[0], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY, %reverb_preset_array[1], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY_UNIT, %reverb_preset_array[2], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_FEEDBACK, %reverb_preset_array[3], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_LOWSHELF, %reverb_preset_array[4], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_HIGHCUT, %reverb_preset_array[5], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY, %reverb_preset_array[6], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_MOD, %reverb_preset_array[7], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_REVERB, %reverb_preset_array[8], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DIFFUSION, %reverb_preset_array[9], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_SIZE, %reverb_preset_array[10], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DAMPING, %reverb_preset_array[11], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_RATE, %reverb_preset_array[12], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_FREEZE, %reverb_preset_array[13], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_SPARSE, %reverb_preset_array[14], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
    call mixer_page_open
    $active_label_displays_ignore := 0
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)
  %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %btn_mixer_channel_enable[4]
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_volume, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
    !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
    call display_value_in_control_label
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_enable, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4)
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    else
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0
    end if
    message("idx: " & %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ", " & "value: " & get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
    !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "microphone_position_states[" & num_elements(%microphone_position_states) & "]: "
    %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < num_elements(%microphone_position_states)) 
      !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & %microphone_position_states[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] & ", "
      inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    message(!___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    call update_mixer_channels
    message("execute purge command")
    $i42 := 0
    $ii8 := 0
    $iii2 := 0
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
      %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $allow_repetitions0 := 0
    $rr1 := 0
    while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
      %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
      inc($rr1)
    end while
    $i42 := 0
    while($i42 <= 0) 
      $ii8 := 0
      while($ii8 <= 7) 
        $iii2 := 0
        while($iii2 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
          end if
          inc($iii2)
        end while
        inc($ii8)
      end while
      inc($i42)
    end while
    $i42 := 0
    while($i42 <= 511) 
      message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
      if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
        message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
        if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
          if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
            $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
            $lowest00 := 0
            $i := 0
            $fade_time1 := $highest1
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $highest00 := $i6
            while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
              purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
              inc($i)
              $fade_time1 := $highest1
              call subarticulation_group_count
              $highest00 := $i6
            end while
            $i331 := $highest00
            message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i42)
    end while
    $i42 := 0
    while($i42 <= 511) 
      if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
        if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
          if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] > 0)
            $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
            $lowest00 := 1
            $i := 0
            $fade_time1 := $highest1
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $highest00 := $i6
            while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
              purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
              inc($i)
              $fade_time1 := $highest1
              call subarticulation_group_count
              $highest00 := $i6
            end while
            $i331 := $highest00
            message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i42)
    end while
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4)
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    else
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0
    end if
    call update_mixer_channels
    message("execute purge command")
    $i42 := 0
    $ii8 := 0
    $iii2 := 0
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
      %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $allow_repetitions0 := 0
    $rr1 := 0
    while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
      %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
      inc($rr1)
    end while
    $i42 := 0
    while($i42 <= 0) 
      $ii8 := 0
      while($ii8 <= 7) 
        $iii2 := 0
        while($iii2 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
          end if
          inc($iii2)
        end while
        inc($ii8)
      end while
      inc($i42)
    end while
    $i42 := 0
    while($i42 <= 511) 
      message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
      if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
        message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
        if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
          if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
            $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
            $lowest00 := 0
            $i := 0
            $fade_time1 := $highest1
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $highest00 := $i6
            while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
              purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
              inc($i)
              $fade_time1 := $highest1
              call subarticulation_group_count
              $highest00 := $i6
            end while
            $i331 := $highest00
            message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i42)
    end while
    $i42 := 0
    while($i42 <= 511) 
      if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
        if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
          if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] > 0)
            $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
            $lowest00 := 1
            $i := 0
            $fade_time1 := $highest1
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $highest00 := $i6
            while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
              purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
              inc($i)
              $fade_time1 := $highest1
              call subarticulation_group_count
              $highest00 := $i6
            end while
            $i331 := $highest00
            message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i42)
    end while
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_pan, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_STEREO_PAN, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_solo, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
      %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
        set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
    end if
    call update_solo_selection
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_mute, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
      %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
        set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
    end if
    call update_solo_selection
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
    !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
    call display_value_in_control_label
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%mnu_mixer_channel_out, %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, get_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) - 1, -1, -1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_off), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_on), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
end on
on ui_control($btn_unpurge_all)
  if($btn_unpurge_all = 1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%microphone_position_states) - 1)) 
      %microphone_position_states[$i] := 1
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%microphone_position_states) - 1)) 
      %microphone_position_states[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  message("execute purge command")
  $i42 := 0
  $ii8 := 0
  $iii2 := 0
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
    %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $allow_repetitions0 := 0
  $rr1 := 0
  while($rr1 < num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)) 
    %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$rr1] := $allow_repetitions0
    inc($rr1)
  end while
  $i42 := 0
  while($i42 <= 0) 
    $ii8 := 0
    while($ii8 <= 7) 
      $iii2 := 0
      while($iii2 <= 3) 
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
        end if
        inc($iii2)
      end while
      inc($ii8)
    end while
    inc($i42)
  end while
  $i42 := 0
  while($i42 <= 511) 
    message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
    if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
      message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
      if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
        if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
          $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
          $lowest00 := 0
          $i := 0
          $fade_time1 := $highest1
          call subarticulation_group_count
          $highest00 := $i6
          while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
            purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
            inc($i)
            $fade_time1 := $highest1
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $highest00 := $i6
          end while
          $i331 := $highest00
          message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($i42)
  end while
  $i42 := 0
  while($i42 <= 511) 
    if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
      if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
        if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] > 0)
          $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
          $lowest00 := 1
          $i := 0
          $fade_time1 := $highest1
          call subarticulation_group_count
          $highest00 := $i6
          while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
            purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
            inc($i)
            $fade_time1 := $highest1
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $highest00 := $i6
          end while
          $i331 := $highest00
          message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($i42)
  end while
end on

on ui_control($mnu_mixer_rev_preset)
  %id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $mnu_mixer_rev_preset
  wait_async(load_array_str(%reverb_preset_array, @REVERB_PRESET_PATH & "reverb_preset" & %id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ".nka"))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_TYPE, %reverb_preset_array[0], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY, %reverb_preset_array[1], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY_UNIT, %reverb_preset_array[2], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_FEEDBACK, %reverb_preset_array[3], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_LOWSHELF, %reverb_preset_array[4], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_HIGHCUT, %reverb_preset_array[5], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY, %reverb_preset_array[6], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_MOD, %reverb_preset_array[7], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_REVERB, %reverb_preset_array[8], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DIFFUSION, %reverb_preset_array[9], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_SIZE, %reverb_preset_array[10], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DAMPING, %reverb_preset_array[11], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_RATE, %reverb_preset_array[12], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_FREEZE, %reverb_preset_array[13], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_SPARSE, %reverb_preset_array[14], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
end on

  $subarticulation_event0 := 0
  call keyswitch_name_edit_show

on ui_control($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve)
  if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 0)
    %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 5
    %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
    %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 40
  else
    if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 1)
      %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
      %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
      %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 40
    else
      if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 2)
        %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 5
        %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
        %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
      else
        if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 3)
          %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
          %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
          %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
        else
          if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 4)
            %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
            %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
            %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  call update_keyswitch_volume_curve
end on
on ui_control($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel)
  %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
end on
on ui_control($btn_solo_subarticulation)
  %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $displayed_subarticulation)] := $btn_solo_subarticulation
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
    $subarticulations_solo_states_any_active := 1
  else
    if(search(%_subarticulations_solo_states, 1) = -1)
      $subarticulations_solo_states_any_active := 0
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$displayed_subarticulation], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
end on
on ui_control($btn_mute_subarticulation)
  %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $displayed_subarticulation)] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$displayed_subarticulation], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
end on
on ui_control($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection0)
  $selected_subarticulation := 0
  call update_subarticulation_selection
end on
on ui_control($btn_editor_overview0)
  $selected_subarticulation := 0
  call update_subarticulation_selection
  $btn_editor_overview0 := 0
end on
on ui_control($btn_editor_overview_solo0)
  %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + ($selected_keyswitch * 4)] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_editor_overview_solo0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_editor_overview_solo0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
    $subarticulations_solo_states_any_active := 1
  else
    if(search(%_subarticulations_solo_states, 1) = -1)
      $subarticulations_solo_states_any_active := 0
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $displayed_subarticulation)])
end on

  %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + ($selected_keyswitch * 4)] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_editor_overview_mute0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $displayed_subarticulation)])
end on

on ui_control($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min)

  wait(10000)
  if($ksv_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
    call update_keyswitch_volume_curve
  end if
end on

    %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * -1
    $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
    call update_keyswitch_volume_curve
  end if

on ui_control(?xy_modwheel_assignment)
  ?xy_modwheel_assignment[1] := 1.
  ?xy_modwheel_assignment[5] := 1.
  if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN)
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%inst5) - 1)) 
      %inst5[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    %inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < num_elements(?xy_modwheel_assignment_buffer)) 
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment_buffer[%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := ?xy_modwheel_assignment[%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      inc(%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0) or (get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
  else
    if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    end if
  end if
  $ma_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 2) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]))
    if(?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] > ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4])
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := (?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) - 0.01
    end if
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] + (?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment_buffer[2])
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := 0.
    end if
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment_buffer[2] := ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]
  else
    if(((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0])) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 20)))
    else
      if(((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 4) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4])) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6]))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 20)))
      else
        if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 6) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6]))
          if(?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] > ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6])
            ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6]
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  wait(10000)
  if($ma_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * 127.)
    %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(ceil((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 127.))
    %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 127.)
    %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * 127.)
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 2)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    else
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      else
        if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 4)
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        else
          if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 6)
            set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    call update_modwheel_assignment_control
    call update_modwheel_assignment_circles
  end if
  wait(1990000)
  if($ma_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?xy_dynamic_range)
  $dr_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0) and (?xy_dynamic_range[0] <= ?xy_dynamic_range[2]))
    %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * 127.)
  else
    if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 2) and (?xy_dynamic_range[0] <= ?xy_dynamic_range[2]))
      %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * 127.)
    end if
  end if
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
    %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := 0
    %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := 127
  end if
  wait(10000)
  if($dr_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int(?xy_dynamic_range[get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX)] * 127.))
    call update_dynamic_range_control
  end if
  wait(1990000)
  if($dr_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
  end if
end on
on ui_control($sli_articulation_humanize)
  %_articulation_humanization[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := $sli_articulation_humanize
  %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_articulation_humanize)
  !legato_name0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $sli_articulation_humanize
  !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
  call display_value_in_control_label
end on

    %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := -1
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular_disabled")
  else
    %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := $sli_articulation_release
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular")
  end if
end on

  if($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?xy_center_circles)
  $cc_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(?angle2) - 1)) 
    ?angle2[$_iter0] := 0.
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%inst5) - 1)) 
    %inst5[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(?distance0) - 1)) 
    ?distance0[$_iter0] := 0.
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN)
    ~fade_level0 := ?xy_center_circles[0]
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 := ?xy_center_circles[1]
    call center_circle_distance
    ?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000
    ~fade_level00 := ?xy_center_circles[0]
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 := ?xy_center_circles[1]
    call center_circle_angle
    ?angle2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ~weight0
    ~fade_level01 := ?angle2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 := 0.7
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := (~NI_MATH_PI * 2.) - 0.7
    call angle_to_value
    %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $subarticulation_event0
    %inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * (1 + (sh_right(127 - %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31) .or. sh_right(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31)))) - (127 * sh_right(127 - %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
    if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.14) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.175))
      $selected_subarticulation := 3
    else
      if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.175) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.21))
        $selected_subarticulation := 2
      else
        if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.21) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.242))
          $selected_subarticulation := 1
        else
          if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.242) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.29))
            $selected_subarticulation := 0
          else
            $selected_subarticulation := -1
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      if(abs(%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) < 10)
        $selected_circle_end := 0
      else
        if(abs(%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) < 10)
          $selected_circle_end := 1
        else
          $selected_circle_end := -1
        end if
      end if
    else
      $selected_circle_end := -1
    end if

      while($i42 <= 511) 
        if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
          if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
            if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] > 0)
              $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
              $lowest00 := 1
              $i := 0
              $fade_time1 := $highest1
              call subarticulation_group_count
              $highest00 := $i6
              while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                inc($i)
                $fade_time1 := $highest1
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $highest00 := $i6
              end while
              $i331 := $highest00
              message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
            end if
          end if
        end if
        inc($i42)
      end while
      call update_keyswitch_selection
    end if
    call PresetBrowser__update_view
  end if
end on

                  %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i42 * 32) + (($ii8 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i42 * 8) + $ii8]
                end if
                inc($iii2)
              end while
              inc($ii8)
            end while
            inc($i42)
          end while
          $i42 := 0
          while($i42 <= 511) 
            message("subarticulations_ids: " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
            if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
              message("group: " & %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i42]])
              if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
                if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] = 0)
                  $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                  $lowest00 := 0
                  $i := 0
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                  while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                    purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                    inc($i)
                    $fade_time1 := $highest1
                    call subarticulation_group_count
                    $highest00 := $i6
                  end while
                  $i331 := $highest00
                  message("purge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($i42)
          end while
          $i42 := 0
          while($i42 <= 511) 
            if(%subarticulations_ids[$i42] >= 0)
              if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
                if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i42]] > 0)
                  $highest1 := %subarticulations_ids[$i42]
                  $lowest00 := 1
                  $i := 0
                  $fade_time1 := $highest1
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $highest00 := $i6
                  while($i <= ($highest00 - 1)) 
                    purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$highest1]] + $i) + 1, $lowest00 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                    inc($i)
                    $fade_time1 := $highest1
                    call subarticulation_group_count
                    $highest00 := $i6
                  end while
                  $i331 := $highest00
                  message("unpurge " & %subarticulations_ids[$i42])
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($i42)
          end while
          call update_keyswitch_selection
        end if
      end if
    end if
    %Browser____is_loading[%self21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 0
  end if
  wait(402000)
  if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - %Utils__clicktime[1]) > 400)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_DC), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    %Utils__clicktime[2] := 0
  end if
end on

on async_complete
  if($NI_ASYNC_ID = $preset__load_id)
    if($NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS = 1)
      $preset__load_id := -1
    else
      if($NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS = 0)
        $preset__load_id := 0
      end if
    end if
  end if
end on
